# Copilot / Agents Build Plan — Repo-by-Repo
# Version: 1.0.0
# Created: 2026-03-23
# Authority: ssot/agents/copilot_agents_target_state.yaml
#
# This plan sequences the work needed to reach the copilot/agents
# target state. Phases are ordered by dependency, not priority.
# Each task has a repo concern, artifact path, and done criteria.

# ============================================================
# Phase 1: SSOT Alignment (immediate — no runtime deps)
# ============================================================
# Fix the delta between existing SSOT files and the target state.

phase_1:
  name: SSOT Alignment
  prereqs: none
  duration_estimate: 1 session

  tasks:
    - id: P1-01
      action: Update diva_copilot_family.yaml — drop Executive as visible copilot
      repo: ssot/agents/
      file: ssot/agents/diva_copilot_family.yaml
      done: 5 members (strategy, odoo, tax_guru, capability, governance)

    - id: P1-02
      action: Update diva_copilot.yaml — remove executive mode, align 5 modes
      repo: ssot/agents/
      file: ssot/agents/diva_copilot.yaml
      done: 5 modes matching visible copilot IDs

    - id: P1-03
      action: Update diva_goals.yaml — replace knowledge_curator with taxpulse, add optional tax_policy_judge
      repo: ssot/agents/
      file: ssot/agents/diva_goals.yaml
      done: 10 agents with taxpulse; optional_agents section with tax_policy_judge

    - id: P1-04
      action: Update spec/diva-goals/constitution.md D4 — replace knowledge_curator with taxpulse
      repo: spec/
      file: spec/diva-goals/constitution.md
      done: D4 table shows taxpulse, D6 shows 5 modes

    - id: P1-05
      action: Verify cross-references — all refs from target_state.yaml resolve
      repo: ssot/agents/
      done: No dangling refs in copilot_agents_target_state.yaml

# ============================================================
# Phase 2: Agent Skill & Persona Artifacts (no runtime deps)
# ============================================================
# Create the missing skill.json and persona files for taxpulse
# and tax_policy_judge.

phase_2:
  name: Agent Skill & Persona Artifacts
  prereqs: [P1-03]

  tasks:
    - id: P2-01
      action: Create taxpulse persona
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/personas/taxpulse.md
      done: Persona file with role, boundary, tools, KB segment refs

    - id: P2-02
      action: Create taxpulse skill definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/skills/taxpulse.skill.json
      done: Skill JSON with inputs, outputs, tool allowlist

    - id: P2-03
      action: Create tax_policy_judge persona (optional agent)
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/personas/tax-policy-judge.md
      done: Persona file with judge boundary, pass/fail output spec

    - id: P2-04
      action: Create tax_policy_judge skill definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/skills/tax_policy_judge.skill.json
      done: Skill JSON with inputs, outputs, tool allowlist

    - id: P2-05
      action: Verify all 12 skill refs in diva_copilot.yaml resolve to real files
      repo: agents/
      done: Every ref in skill_pack resolves to a valid .skill.json

# ============================================================
# Phase 3: Knowledge Base Provisioning
# ============================================================
# Create the 8 KB segment source definitions and wire them
# to Azure AI Search index definitions.

phase_3:
  name: Knowledge Base Provisioning
  prereqs: [P1-01]

  tasks:
    - id: P3-01
      action: Populate agents/knowledge/diva-copilot-sources.yaml with 8 KB segment definitions
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/knowledge/diva-copilot-sources.yaml
      done: 8 segments with source_type, index_name, refresh_strategy, access_policy

    - id: P3-02
      action: Create Azure AI Search index definitions for each KB segment
      repo: infra/
      file: infra/azure/ai-search/kb-indexes/
      done: 8 index definition files (JSON/YAML)

    - id: P3-03
      action: Create KB ingestion pipeline configs (source → chunking → indexing)
      repo: data-intelligence/
      file: data-intelligence/pipelines/kb/
      done: Pipeline definitions for each KB with source, chunk strategy, refresh cron

    - id: P3-04
      action: Wire MCP knowledge_base_retrieve tool to Foundry agent config
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/foundry/ipai-odoo-copilot-azure/tool-definitions.json
      done: knowledge_base_retrieve tool registered with segment routing

# ============================================================
# Phase 4: Workflow Definitions (Agent Framework)
# ============================================================
# Define the 5 canonical workflows as Agent Framework artifacts.

phase_4:
  name: Workflow Definitions
  prereqs: [P2-01, P2-02]

  tasks:
    - id: P4-01
      action: Create goal_status_synthesis workflow definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/workflows/goal-status-synthesis.yaml
      done: Workflow with steps, agent assignments, input/output contracts

    - id: P4-02
      action: Create review_pack_generation workflow definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/workflows/review-pack-generation.yaml
      done: Workflow with maker-checker gate at judged→approved transition

    - id: P4-03
      action: Create capability_readiness_review workflow definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/workflows/capability-readiness-review.yaml
      done: Workflow with readiness_judge fail-closed gate

    - id: P4-04
      action: Create learning_plan_recommendation workflow definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/workflows/learning-plan-recommendation.yaml
      done: Workflow triggered by gap_detected event

    - id: P4-05
      action: Create odoo_tax_assist workflow definition
      repo: agents/
      file: agents/workflows/odoo-tax-assist.yaml
      done: Workflow with taxpulse worker and policy_judge/tax_policy_judge gate

# ============================================================
# Phase 5: Odoo Bridge Updates
# ============================================================
# Update the Odoo copilot module to support the 5-copilot model
# and taxpulse routing.

phase_5:
  name: Odoo Bridge Updates
  prereqs: [P1-01, P2-01]

  tasks:
    - id: P5-01
      action: Update diva_bridge.py — add taxpulse routing, remove knowledge_curator refs
      repo: addons/ipai/
      file: addons/ipai/ipai_odoo_copilot/services/diva_bridge.py
      done: Bridge routes to taxpulse for tax domain; no knowledge_curator calls

    - id: P5-02
      action: Update copilot_gateway.py — align mode list to 5 visible copilots
      repo: addons/ipai/
      file: addons/ipai/ipai_odoo_copilot/controllers/copilot_gateway.py
      done: Gateway validates against 5 mode IDs (not 6)

    - id: P5-03
      action: Add copilot mode tests for 5-copilot model
      repo: addons/ipai/
      file: addons/ipai/ipai_odoo_copilot/tests/
      done: Test coverage for mode routing to all 5 copilots

# ============================================================
# Phase 6: Web UI — Diva Goals App Shell
# ============================================================
# Build out the Fluent 2 React app beyond scaffold.

phase_6:
  name: Web UI — Diva Goals App Shell
  prereqs: [P1-01]

  tasks:
    - id: P6-01
      action: Implement GoalListPage with Fluent 2 DataGrid
      repo: web/
      file: web/apps/diva-goals/src/pages/GoalListPage.tsx
      done: Renders goal list from API, filterable, Fluent 2 styled

    - id: P6-02
      action: Implement CopilotPanel with 5-copilot mode switcher
      repo: web/
      file: web/apps/diva-goals/src/patterns/CopilotPanel.tsx
      done: Mode selector renders 5 copilot names, routes messages to correct mode

    - id: P6-03
      action: Implement EvidencePanel for KB-grounded citations
      repo: web/
      file: web/apps/diva-goals/src/patterns/EvidencePanel.tsx
      done: Displays citations with source KB segment, confidence score

    - id: P6-04
      action: Implement ApprovalDrawer for proposal state machine
      repo: web/
      file: web/apps/diva-goals/src/patterns/ApprovalDrawer.tsx
      done: Renders proposal state, allows human gate actions (approve/reject/escalate)

# ============================================================
# Phase 7: Microsoft Runtime Provisioning
# ============================================================
# Provision Azure resources. Depends on Phase 3 (KB definitions)
# and Phase 4 (workflow definitions).

phase_7:
  name: Microsoft Runtime Provisioning
  prereqs: [P3-01, P4-01]

  tasks:
    - id: P7-01
      action: Provision Foundry resource + project
      repo: infra/
      file: infra/azure/foundry/
      done: Foundry resource exists, project created, agents deployable

    - id: P7-02
      action: Provision Azure AI Search service + 8 KB indexes
      repo: infra/
      file: infra/azure/ai-search/
      done: Search service provisioned, 8 indexes created, MCP endpoint configured

    - id: P7-03
      action: Provision 3 managed identities (web, jobs, agent-data)
      repo: infra/
      file: infra/azure/identity/
      done: 3 MIs created, RBAC assignments for Key Vault + Foundry + Search

    - id: P7-04
      action: Deploy Foundry Agent Service with initial agent registrations
      repo: infra/
      file: infra/azure/foundry/
      done: Agent Service boundary active, at least diva_orchestrator registered

    - id: P7-05
      action: Wire managed identities to existing Container Apps
      repo: infra/
      file: infra/azure/aca/
      done: ipai-odoo-dev-web, worker, cron use MI instead of embedded secrets

# ============================================================
# Phase 8: Data Intelligence — Evidence Pipeline
# ============================================================
# Complete the lakehouse evidence pipeline for Diva Goals.

phase_8:
  name: Data Intelligence — Evidence Pipeline
  prereqs: [P1-03]

  tasks:
    - id: P8-01
      action: Add taxpulse evidence source to silver pipeline
      repo: data-intelligence/
      file: data-intelligence/lakehouse/silver/diva_evidence_normalized.py
      done: TaxPulse computation results joined into evidence normalization

    - id: P8-02
      action: Add blocker aggregation to gold mart
      repo: data-intelligence/
      file: data-intelligence/lakehouse/gold/diva_review_mart.py
      done: Blocker type, count, and resolution status in gold output

    - id: P8-03
      action: Create KB freshness monitoring pipeline
      repo: data-intelligence/
      file: data-intelligence/pipelines/kb/freshness_monitor.py
      done: Pipeline tracks last-refresh per KB segment, alerts on staleness

# ============================================================
# Phase 9: Eval & Governance
# ============================================================
# Evaluation framework for agent quality gates.

phase_9:
  name: Eval & Governance
  prereqs: [P4-01, P7-04]

  tasks:
    - id: P9-01
      action: Create eval suite for each backend agent (10 agents × test scenarios)
      repo: foundry/
      file: foundry/evals/diva-goals/
      done: Eval thresholds for each agent with pass/fail criteria

    - id: P9-02
      action: Create integration test for proposal state machine end-to-end
      repo: tests/
      file: tests/copilot/test_proposal_state_machine.py
      done: Test walks draft→published happy path and blocked paths

    - id: P9-03
      action: Create maker-checker gate test (policy_judge cannot approve its own eval)
      repo: tests/
      file: tests/copilot/test_maker_checker_split.py
      done: Test verifies no agent both creates and approves in any workflow


# ============================================================
# Build Order Summary
# ============================================================

build_order:
  immediate:
    - phase_1  # SSOT alignment (no deps)
  next:
    - phase_2  # Skills & personas
    - phase_3  # KB provisioning (parallel with P2)
  then:
    - phase_4  # Workflow definitions
    - phase_5  # Odoo bridge updates (parallel with P4)
    - phase_6  # Web UI (parallel with P4/P5)
  runtime:
    - phase_7  # Azure provisioning
  polish:
    - phase_8  # Evidence pipeline
    - phase_9  # Eval & governance

total_tasks: 35

# Copilot / Agents Target State — Machine-Readable SSOT
# Version: 1.0.0
# Created: 2026-03-23
# Authority: This file defines the complete target end state for the
#   Diva Goals app, Diva Copilot family, backend agent layer, and
#   Microsoft runtime provisioning. All build plans and provisioning
#   scripts reference this file as the single source of truth.
#
# Related files:
#   - ssot/agents/diva_copilot.yaml (shell config)
#   - ssot/agents/diva_copilot_family.yaml (mode taxonomy)
#   - ssot/agents/diva_goals.yaml (agent catalog + workflows)
#   - spec/diva-goals/constitution.md (D1-D10 rules)
#   - spec/ipai-odoo-copilot-azure/constitution.md (C1-C9 rules)

metadata.title: Copilot / Agents Target State — Machine-Readable SSOT

text:
# ============================================================
# 1. Product Shape
# ============================================================

product:
  app:
    id: diva-goals
    name: Diva Goals
    modules:
      - id: goals
        name: Goals
        purpose: Strategic and operational goal definition, cascading, tracking
        prerequisite: true  # All other modules require this
      - id: execution_graph
        name: Execution Graph
        purpose: Goal-to-task decomposition, dependency mapping, progress aggregation
      - id: people_capability
        name: People Capability
        purpose: Skills inventory, gap analysis, learning plans for humans
      - id: agent_capability
        name: Agent Capability
        purpose: Agent skills inventory, readiness assessment, promotion gates
      - id: reviews
        name: Reviews
        purpose: Periodic review packs, evidence-backed performance synthesis, approvals
      - id: governance
        name: Governance
        purpose: Policy enforcement, drift detection, orphan detection, compliance gates
    ux_framework: fluent-2
    accessibility: wcag-2.2-aa

  copilot_family:
    id: diva-copilot
    name: Diva Copilot
    architecture: thin-shell  # Not monolithic; persona + skills + KB composition
    shell_ref: ssot/agents/diva_copilot.yaml

    # 5 visible copilots — user-facing brands
    visible_copilots:
      - id: strategy
        name: Diva Strategy Copilot
        audience: Leadership, strategy owners, OKR practitioners
        skills:
          - strategy_review
          - portfolio_alignment
          - evidence_traceability
        kb_segments:
          - kb_strategy
          - kb_execution
          - kb_governance

      - id: odoo
        name: Diva Odoo Copilot
        audience: ERP operators, finance team, back-office
        skills: inherited_from_odoo_copilot
        kb_segments: inherited_from_odoo_copilot

      - id: tax_guru
        name: Diva Tax Guru
        audience: Tax compliance, BIR filing, finance leads
        skills:
          - tax_advisory_diva
          - bir_workflow_diva
          - tax_evidence_collection
        kb_segments:
          - kb_tax_policy_ph
          - kb_odoo_tax_runtime
          - kb_tax_evidence
        sub_agent_ref: taxpulse

      - id: capability
        name: Diva Capability Copilot
        audience: HR leads, team leads, agent operators
        skills:
          - capability_gap_analysis
          - learning_path_designer
          - agent_readiness
        kb_segments:
          - kb_people_capability
          - kb_agent_capability

      - id: governance
        name: Diva Governance Copilot
        audience: Compliance officers, governance reviewers
        skills:
          - drift_orphan_detection
          - policy_sufficiency_judge
        kb_segments:
          - kb_governance

  # Backend agent layer — not end-user brands
  backend_agents:
    catalog_size: 10  # 11 with optional tax_policy_judge
    catalog_ref: ssot/agents/diva_goals.yaml

    agents:
      - id: diva_orchestrator
        role: Workflow coordination and step sequencing
        type: orchestrator
        boundary: Never generates content directly; delegates to specialist agents
        tools_allowed: [workflow_invoke, step_sequence, context_assemble]
        tools_forbidden: [content_generation, direct_odoo_write]

      - id: evidence_harvester
        role: Evidence collection from Odoo, Databricks, external sources
        type: maker
        boundary: Read-only; never synthesizes or interprets evidence
        tools_allowed: [odoo_read, databricks_query, kb_search, attachment_read]
        tools_forbidden: [odoo_write, content_synthesis]

      - id: status_synthesizer
        role: Goal status narrative generation from collected evidence
        type: maker
        boundary: Every claim must have a citation; never invents data
        tools_allowed: [evidence_summarize, citation_attach, narrative_generate]
        tools_forbidden: [data_invention, uncited_assertion]

      - id: review_pack_writer
        role: Review document assembly from synthesized evidence
        type: maker
        boundary: Cannot approve its own output; assembles only
        tools_allowed: [template_render, evidence_attach, section_compose]
        tools_forbidden: [self_approve, evidence_modify]

      - id: capability_mapper
        role: Skills-to-roles mapping and gap identification
        type: maker
        boundary: Identifies gaps; does not assign learning plans or modify roles
        tools_allowed: [skills_inventory, gap_compute, competency_lookup]
        tools_forbidden: [learning_plan_assign, role_modify]

      - id: drift_detector
        role: Goal drift and orphan task identification
        type: maker
        boundary: Detection only; does not remediate or modify goals
        tools_allowed: [goal_scan, staleness_check, orphan_detect]
        tools_forbidden: [goal_modify, task_close]

      - id: policy_judge
        role: Proposal evaluation against governance policies
        type: judge
        boundary: Binary pass/fail with reasoning; never suggests remediation
        tools_allowed: [policy_lookup, rule_evaluate, compliance_check]
        tools_forbidden: [remediation_suggest, policy_modify]

      - id: readiness_judge
        role: Agent or team readiness assessment for promotion
        type: judge
        boundary: Fail-closed on missing evidence; never promotes directly
        tools_allowed: [eval_metrics_read, criteria_check, threshold_evaluate]
        tools_forbidden: [promotion_execute, criteria_modify]

      - id: approval_coordinator
        role: Approval routing, sign-off tracking, gate enforcement
        type: coordinator
        boundary: No authority to auto-approve; routes to designated approvers
        tools_allowed: [approval_route, signoff_track, gate_enforce]
        tools_forbidden: [auto_approve, gate_bypass]

      - id: taxpulse
        role: Tax computation worker, BIR filing preparation, evidence collection
        type: maker
        boundary: Computes and prepares; never files or posts without approval
        tools_allowed: [tax_compute, bir_form_render, evidence_collect, odoo_tax_read]
        tools_forbidden: [tax_file_submit, journal_post, auto_approve]

    optional_agents:
      - id: tax_policy_judge
        role: Tax policy compliance evaluation (maker/judge split for tax)
        type: judge
        boundary: Binary pass/fail on tax compliance; never remediates
        tools_allowed: [tax_policy_lookup, bir_rule_evaluate, compliance_check]
        tools_forbidden: [tax_compute, remediation_suggest]
        recommendation: Recommended for proper maker/judge split in tax domain


# ============================================================
# 2. Microsoft Runtime Target
# ============================================================

microsoft_runtime:
  foundry:
    resource:
      count: 1
      purpose: Central agent runtime/governance hub
      success_criteria: Foundry is the single pane for agent lifecycle

    project:
      count: 1
      purpose: One project contains all Diva copilot/agent assets
      success_criteria: All agents, tools, and evals live under one project

    agent_service:
      count: 1
      purpose: Agents run under one managed service boundary
      success_criteria: All backend agents execute within Foundry Agent Service
      preview_caveat: >
        Hosted agents are in preview. Private networking for network-isolated
        Foundry resources is not supported during preview. Keep custom app/API
        glue in controlled runtime plane until GA.

  agent_framework:
    workflow_count: 5
    workflows:
      - id: goal_status_synthesis
        domain: goals
        trigger: scheduled_or_on_demand
        agents_involved: [diva_orchestrator, evidence_harvester, status_synthesizer, policy_judge]
        output: Evidence-backed goal status narrative with citations

      - id: review_pack_generation
        domain: reviews
        trigger: stage_transition
        agents_involved: [diva_orchestrator, evidence_harvester, status_synthesizer, review_pack_writer, policy_judge, approval_coordinator]
        output: Review document with evidence attachments and approval routing

      - id: capability_readiness_review
        domain: capability
        trigger: scheduled_or_promotion_request
        agents_involved: [diva_orchestrator, capability_mapper, readiness_judge]
        output: Readiness assessment with gap analysis and promotion recommendation

      - id: learning_plan_recommendation
        domain: capability
        trigger: gap_detected
        agents_involved: [diva_orchestrator, capability_mapper]
        output: Suggested learning paths mapped to identified skill gaps

      - id: odoo_tax_assist
        domain: tax
        trigger: copilot_invocation
        agents_involved: [diva_orchestrator, taxpulse, policy_judge]
        optional_agents: [tax_policy_judge]
        output: Tax computation, BIR form preparation, filing evidence

  search:
    service:
      count: 1
      name: Azure AI Search
      purpose: KB-backed retrieval for all grounded agents
      success_criteria: Search-backed KB retrieval works through MCP
      integration: knowledge_base_retrieve (MCP tool)

    knowledge_bases:
      count: 8
      segments:
        - id: kb_strategy
          domain: Strategic planning frameworks, OKR methodology
          consumers: [strategy, governance]

        - id: kb_execution
          domain: Execution tracking patterns, progress aggregation rules
          consumers: [strategy]

        - id: kb_people_capability
          domain: Skills taxonomies, competency frameworks, learning design
          consumers: [capability]

        - id: kb_agent_capability
          domain: Agent skill inventories, readiness criteria, promotion gates
          consumers: [capability]

        - id: kb_governance
          domain: Policy templates, compliance rules, drift thresholds
          consumers: [strategy, governance]

        - id: kb_tax_policy_ph
          domain: BIR regulations, TRAIN law, Philippine tax policy
          consumers: [tax_guru]

        - id: kb_odoo_tax_runtime
          domain: Odoo tax module configuration, filing workflows
          consumers: [tax_guru, odoo]

        - id: kb_tax_evidence
          domain: Tax computation evidence, filing artifacts, audit trails
          consumers: [tax_guru]

  identity:
    entra_tenant_count: 1
    verified_root_domain_count: 1
    entra_domain_services: 0  # Not needed for Foundry/Agent Framework
    extra_entra_subdomains: 0  # Not needed for agents/copilots

    managed_identities:
      count: 3  # Minimum
      identities:
        - id: mi-web-runtime
          purpose: Odoo web, copilot gateway, user-facing services
          scope: Container Apps (web tier)

        - id: mi-jobs-automation
          purpose: Odoo workers, cron, n8n, background processing
          scope: Container Apps (worker tier)

        - id: mi-agent-data
          purpose: Foundry agents, Databricks, AI Search, Key Vault access
          scope: Agent runtime + data plane


# ============================================================
# 3. Repo Mapping
# ============================================================

repo_mapping:
  - concern: Visible copilots, skills, judges, workflows
    path: agents/
    key_files:
      - agents/personas/diva-copilot-*.md
      - agents/skills/*.skill.json
      - agents/knowledge/diva-copilot-sources.yaml
      - agents/foundry/ipai-odoo-copilot-azure/

  - concern: Control-plane state, approvals, contracts
    path: platform/
    key_files: []

  - concern: App shell, copilot panels, Fluent 2 UI
    path: web/
    key_files:
      - web/apps/diva-goals/

  - concern: Odoo adapter, action queue, diva bridge
    path: odoo/  # Also addons/ipai/
    key_files:
      - addons/ipai/ipai_odoo_copilot/
      - addons/ipai/ipai_copilot_actions/

  - concern: Evidence and review marts
    path: data-intelligence/
    key_files:
      - data-intelligence/contracts/diva_goals_evidence.yaml
      - data-intelligence/lakehouse/silver/diva_evidence_normalized.py
      - data-intelligence/lakehouse/gold/diva_review_mart.py

  - concern: Architecture, runbooks
    path: docs/
    key_files: []

  - concern: Runtime substrate
    path: infra/
    key_files: []


# ============================================================
# 4. Success Criteria
# ============================================================

success_criteria:
  copilot_family:
    - Every visible copilot has a clear, named audience
    - Every visible copilot routes to a bounded set of skills/workflows
    - No "one giant Diva assistant" anti-pattern emerges
    - Thin-shell architecture maintained (no domain logic in shell)

  agent_layer:
    - Maker and judge roles are separate (no agent both creates and approves)
    - No executive-visible status publishes without judge + approval path
    - Workflows are explicit Agent Framework definitions, not hidden in prompts
    - All agents have declared tool allowlists and boundaries

  knowledge:
    - Agents answer from KB-grounded evidence (no free-form advice)
    - Weak evidence routes to judge/human review
    - Tax retrieval is isolated from general strategy retrieval
    - knowledge_base_retrieve via MCP is the only retrieval interface

  runtime:
    - Foundry project hosts the agent estate cleanly
    - Search-backed KB retrieval works through MCP
    - Managed identities replace embedded secrets for all Azure workloads
    - No Entra Domain Services provisioned

  odoo_integration:
    - Odoo Copilot remains a context adapter (not a data store)
    - Tax Guru is user-facing; TaxPulse is the worker
    - No direct posting/file submission bypasses approval coordinator
    - Proposal state machine (D3) enforced for all agent-generated output


# ============================================================
# 5. Counts Summary
# ============================================================

counts:
  user_facing:
    app_products: 1        # Diva Goals
    copilot_families: 1    # Diva Copilot
    visible_copilots: 5    # Strategy, Odoo, Tax Guru, Capability, Governance

  agent_layer:
    backend_agents: 10     # 11 with optional tax_policy_judge
    workflows: 5
    kb_segments: 8

  microsoft_runtime:
    foundry_resources: 1
    foundry_projects: 1
    foundry_agent_services: 1
    azure_ai_search_services: 1
    managed_identities: 3  # Minimum

  not_provisioned:
    entra_domain_services: 0
    extra_entra_subdomains: 0

  scaling_notes:
    - Additional Foundry projects only if environments or products split
    - Additional Search services only if governance/performance requires isolation
    - Additional copilots only when a real user audience appears


# ============================================================
# 6. Governance References
# ============================================================

governance:
  constitutions:
    - ref: spec/ipai-odoo-copilot-azure/constitution.md
      rules: C1-C9
      scope: Odoo Copilot core
    - ref: spec/diva-goals/constitution.md
      rules: D1-D10
      scope: Diva Goals product family
    - ref: spec/tax-pulse-sub-agent/constitution.md
      rules: C1-C8
      scope: TaxPulse sub-agent

  proposal_state_machine:
    states:
      - draft
      - evidence_collected
      - synthesized
      - judged
      - needs_human_review
      - approved
      - published
      - blocked_insufficient_evidence
      - blocked_policy_violation
      - blocked_confidence_low
    confidence_threshold: 0.85
    human_gate_on_publish: true

  orchestration_default: sequential
  gate_pattern: maker-checker
  fan_out_permitted: evidence_collection_only


# ============================================================
# 7. Delta from Current State
# ============================================================

delta_from_current:
  copilot_family:
    change: Reduce from 6 modes to 5 visible copilots
    detail: >
      Executive mode dropped as a separate visible copilot.
      Executive-level summaries are a feature of Strategy Copilot,
      not a separate brand. diva_copilot_family.yaml needs update.

  backend_agents:
    change: Replace knowledge_curator with taxpulse; add optional tax_policy_judge
    detail: >
      knowledge_curator (KB maintenance) is an operational concern, not a
      Diva Goals workflow agent. taxpulse (tax computation worker) is the
      correct 10th agent for the product family. tax_policy_judge is the
      recommended 11th for maker/judge split in tax domain.
      diva_goals.yaml needs update.

  microsoft_runtime:
    change: Formalize Foundry + Agent Framework + AI Search provisioning
    detail: >
      No new Azure services beyond what's already in the architecture.
      This formalizes the provisioning targets and success criteria.

  near_term_caveat:
    change: Acknowledge hosted agents preview limitation
    detail: >
      Hosted agents in Foundry Agent Service are preview. Private networking
      not supported during preview. Keep custom glue in controlled plane
      until GA. Do not over-assume mature hosted-agent networking.

metadata.title: Copilot / Agents Target State — Machine-Readable SSOT

text:
# =============================================================================
# Agent Credential Framework — SSOT
# =============================================================================
# Internal credential system for AI agents, modeled on Microsoft certification
# poster structure (Fundamentals / Role-based / Specialty / Business).
#
# Each pack has: skills, knowledge, tools, boundaries, evals.
# Skill (what agent can DO) != Knowledge (what agent must KNOW/REFERENCE).
#
# Last reviewed: 2026-03-28
# =============================================================================

framework_version: 1

tiers:
  - fundamentals
  - role_based
  - specialty
  - business

domains:
  - cloud_ai_platforms
  - ai_business_solutions
  - security_identity
  - data_intelligence
  - marketplace_distribution
  - odoo_runtime

pack_requirements:
  required_sections:
    - summary
    - owned_surfaces
    - prerequisite_packs
    - skills
    - knowledge_sources
    - tool_permissions
    - boundaries
    - evals
    - evidence

{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "ipai.dead_letter.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "record_type",
    "record_version",
    "task_id",
    "task_type",
    "failure_reason",
    "attempts",
    "first_seen_at",
    "last_failed_at",
    "trace_id",
    "evidence_refs"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "record_type": { "type": "string", "const": "dead_letter" },
    "record_version": { "type": "string" },
    "task_id": { "type": "string" },
    "task_type": { "type": "string" },
    "failure_reason": { "type": "string" },
    "attempts": { "type": "integer" },
    "first_seen_at": { "type": "string", "format": "date-time" },
    "last_failed_at": { "type": "string", "format": "date-time" },
    "trace_id": { "type": "string" },
    "evidence_refs": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": { "type": "string" }
    }
  }
}

model_policy:
  landing_public_assistant:
    primary_model: gpt-5-mini
    escalation_model: gpt-5.4
    rationale: high-throughput public advisory surface
  odoo_copilot_internal_beta:
    primary_model: gpt-5.2
    escalation_model: gpt-5.4
    rationale: best product-quality / latency / cost balance
  coding_release_assistant:
    primary_model: gpt-5.4
    secondary_model: gpt-5.2-codex
    rationale: top coding quality plus strong reasoning fallback
  data_intelligence_assistant:
    primary_model: gpt-5.2
    batch_model: gpt-5-mini
    rationale: governed Q&A plus cheap triage
  judges_and_evals:
    primary_model: gpt-5.4
    benchmark_model: gpt-5-pro
    rationale: evaluation-first, not inline traffic
  note: >
    gpt-4.1 is the currently deployed model. GPT-5 tier models are the target
    state and will be adopted as deployments become available on the Foundry runtime.

policy:
  default_tool_mode: allowlisted
  write_actions_allowed: false
  fail_closed_on_missing_context: true
  fail_closed_on_missing_kb_segment: true
  grounding_required: true
  confidence_threshold_for_auto_approve: 0.85

text:
agent_id: diva-copilot-family
name: Diva Copilot Family Taxonomy
version: 0.1.0-alpha
stage: modelling
status: specification-active
created_at: "2026-03-23"
spec_bundle: spec/diva-goals/

purpose: >
  Defines the 5-member Diva Copilot family. Each member is a visible copilot
  mode of the thin copilot shell, activating a specific persona overlay, skill
  subset, and KB segment set. Not separate agents — modes of one shell.
  Executive-level summaries are a feature of Strategy Copilot, not a separate brand.

shell_ref: ssot/agents/diva_copilot.yaml

members:
  - id: strategy
    name: Diva Strategy Copilot
    persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-system.md
    persona_overlay: >
      You are the Strategy Copilot of the Diva family. Specialize in OKR methodology,
      goal cascading, strategic alignment, and portfolio-level status synthesis.
      Provide evidence-traced recommendations with governance awareness.
      Include executive-level summaries when requested.
    skill_refs:
      - agents/skills/strategy_review.skill.json
      - agents/skills/portfolio_alignment.skill.json
      - agents/skills/evidence_traceability.skill.json
    kb_segments:
      - kb_strategy
      - kb_execution
      - kb_governance
    mode_overrides:
      verbosity: detailed
      detail_level: analysis
      approval_authority: none

  - id: odoo
    name: Diva Odoo Copilot
    persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-system.md
    persona_overlay: >
      You are the Odoo mode of Diva Copilot. Inherited from the core Odoo Copilot.
      Provide ERP operations assistance, record lookup, and workflow guidance.
    skill_refs: inherited_from_odoo_copilot
    kb_segments: inherited_from_odoo_copilot
    mode_overrides:
      verbosity: standard
      detail_level: operational

skill_refs: - agents/skills/strategy_review.skill.json - agents/skills/portfolio_alignment.skill.json - agents/skills/evidence_traceability.skill.json kb_segments: - kb_strategy - kb_execution - kb_governance mode_overrides: verbosity: detailed detail_level: analysis approval_authority: none - id: odoo name: Diva Odoo Copilot persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-system.md persona_overlay: > You are the Odoo mode of Diva Copilot. Inherited from the core Odoo Copilot. Provide ERP operations assistance, record lookup, and workflow guidance. skill_refs: inherited_from_odoo_copilot kb_segments: inherited_from_odoo_copilot mode_overrides: verbosity: standard detail_level: operational

  - id: tax_guru
    name: Diva Tax Guru Copilot
    persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-tax-guru.md
    persona_overlay: >
      You are the Tax Guru mode of Diva Copilot. Wraps the TaxPulse sub-agent
      for Philippine BIR tax compliance. Route deep tax questions to TaxPulse;
      provide contextual tax guidance within Diva Goals scope.
    skill_refs:
      - agents/skills/tax_advisory_diva.skill.json
      - agents/skills/bir_workflow_diva.skill.json
      - agents/skills/tax_evidence_collection.skill.json
    kb_segments:
      - kb_tax_policy_ph
      - kb_odoo_tax_runtime
      - kb_tax_evidence
    mode_overrides:
      verbosity: detailed
      detail_level: compliance
      approval_authority: none
      sub_agent_ref: spec/tax-pulse-sub-agent/

name: Diva Tax Guru Copilot persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-tax-guru.md persona_overlay: > You are the Tax Guru mode of Diva Copilot. Wraps the TaxPulse sub-agent for Philippine BIR tax compliance. Route deep tax questions to TaxPulse; provide contextual tax guidance within Diva Goals scope. skill_refs: - agents/skills/tax_advisory_diva.skill.json - agents/skills/bir_workflow_diva.skill.json - agents/skills/tax_evidence_collection.skill.json kb_segments: - kb_tax_policy_ph - kb_odoo_tax_runtime - kb_tax_evidence mode_overrides: verbosity: detailed detail_level: compliance approval_authority: none sub_agent_ref: spec/tax-pulse-sub-agent/

  - id: capability
    name: Diva Capability Copilot
    persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-system.md
    persona_overlay: >
      You are the Capability mode of Diva Copilot. Advise on people and agent
      capability assessment, gap analysis, learning paths, and readiness reviews.
    skill_refs:
      - agents/skills/capability_gap_analysis.skill.json
      - agents/skills/learning_path_designer.skill.json
      - agents/skills/agent_readiness.skill.json
    kb_segments:
      - kb_people_capability
      - kb_agent_capability
    mode_overrides:
      verbosity: detailed
      detail_level: assessment
      approval_authority: none

  - id: governance
    name: Diva Governance Copilot
    persona_ref: agents/personas/diva-copilot-system.md
    persona_overlay: >
      You are the Governance mode of Diva Copilot. Enforce policy compliance,
      detect drift and orphan goals, and evaluate policy sufficiency. Always
      provide evidence-backed judgments.
    skill_refs:
      - agents/skills/drift_orphan_detection.skill.json
      - agents/skills/policy_sufficiency_judge.skill.json
    kb_segments:
      - kb_governance
    mode_overrides:
      verbosity: standard
      detail_level: compliance
      approval_authority: policy_gate

agent_id: diva-goals
name: Diva Goals Agent Catalog
version: 0.1.0-alpha
stage: modelling
status: specification-active
created_at: "2026-03-23"
spec_bundle: spec/diva-goals/

platform:
  orchestration: Microsoft Foundry
  transactional_authority: Odoo
  analytics: Databricks

agents:
  - id: diva_orchestrator
    role: Workflow coordination and step sequencing
    tools:
      allowed:
        - workflow_invoke
        - step_sequence
        - context_assemble
      forbidden:
        - content_generation
        - direct_odoo_write
    boundary: Never generates content directly; delegates to specialist agents

  - id: evidence_harvester
    role: Evidence collection from Odoo, Databricks, and external sources
    tools:
      allowed:
        - odoo_read
        - databricks_query
        - kb_search
        - attachment_read
      forbidden:
        - odoo_write
        - content_synthesis
    boundary: Read-only; never synthesizes or interprets evidence

  - id: status_synthesizer
    role: Goal status narrative generation from collected evidence
    tools:
      allowed:
        - evidence_summarize
        - citation_attach
        - narrative_generate
      forbidden:
        - data_invention
        - uncited_assertion
    boundary: Every claim must have a citation; never invents data

  - id: policy_judge
    role: Proposal evaluation against governance policies
    tools:
      allowed:
        - policy_lookup
        - rule_evaluate
        - compliance_check
      forbidden:
        - remediation_suggest
        - policy_modify
    boundary: Binary pass/fail with reasoning; never suggests remediation

  - id: review_pack_writer
    role: Review document assembly from synthesized evidence
    tools:
      allowed:
        - template_render
        - evidence_attach
        - section_compose
      forbidden:
        - self_approve
        - evidence_modify
    boundary: Cannot approve its own output; assembles only

never invents data - id: policy_judge role: Proposal evaluation against governance policies tools: allowed: - policy_lookup - rule_evaluate - compliance_check forbidden: - remediation_suggest - policy_modify boundary: Binary pass/fail with reasoning; never suggests remediation - id: review_pack_writer role: Review document assembly from synthesized evidence tools: allowed: - template_render - evidence_attach - section_compose forbidden: - self_approve - evidence_modify boundary: Cannot approve its own output; assembles only

  - id: capability_mapper
    role: Skills-to-roles mapping and gap identification
    tools:
      allowed:
        - skills_inventory
        - gap_compute
        - competency_lookup
      forbidden:
        - learning_plan_assign
        - role_modify
    boundary: Identifies gaps; does not assign learning plans or modify roles

  - id: drift_detector
    role: Goal drift and orphan task identification
    tools:
      allowed:
        - goal_scan
        - staleness_check
        - orphan_detect
      forbidden:
        - goal_modify
        - task_close
    boundary: Detection only; does not remediate or modify goals

  - id: readiness_judge
    role: Agent or team readiness assessment for promotion
    tools:
      allowed:
        - eval_metrics_read
        - criteria_check
        - threshold_evaluate
      forbidden:
        - promotion_execute
        - criteria_modify
    boundary: Fail-closed on missing evidence; never promotes directly

  - id: approval_coordinator
    role: Approval routing, sign-off tracking, gate enforcement
    tools:
      allowed:
        - approval_route
        - signoff_track
        - gate_enforce
      forbidden:
        - auto_approve
        - gate_bypass
    boundary: No authority to auto-approve; routes to designated approvers

- id: readiness_judge role: Agent or team readiness assessment for promotion tools: allowed: - eval_metrics_read - criteria_check - threshold_evaluate forbidden: - promotion_execute - criteria_modify boundary: Fail-closed on missing evidence; never promotes directly - id: approval_coordinator role: Approval routing, sign-off tracking, gate enforcement tools: allowed: - approval_route - signoff_track - gate_enforce forbidden: - auto_approve - gate_bypass boundary: No authority to auto-approve; routes to designated approvers

  - id: taxpulse
    role: Tax computation worker, BIR filing preparation, evidence collection
    tools:
      allowed:
        - tax_compute
        - bir_form_render
        - evidence_collect
        - odoo_tax_read
      forbidden:
        - tax_file_submit
        - journal_post
        - auto_approve
    boundary: Computes and prepares; never files or posts without approval

optional_agents:
  - id: tax_policy_judge
    role: Tax policy compliance evaluation (maker/judge split for tax)
    tools:
      allowed:
        - tax_policy_lookup
        - bir_rule_evaluate
        - compliance_check
      forbidden:
        - tax_compute
        - remediation_suggest
    boundary: Binary pass/fail on tax compliance; never remediates
    recommendation: Recommended for proper maker/judge split in tax domain

workflows:
  - id: goal-status-synthesis
    ref: agents/workflows/goal-status-synthesis.yaml
    domain: goals
    trigger: scheduled_or_on_demand

  - id: review-pack-generation
    ref: agents/workflows/review-pack-generation.yaml
    domain: reviews
    trigger: stage_transition

  - id: capability-readiness-review
    ref: agents/workflows/capability-readiness-review.yaml
    domain: capability
    trigger: scheduled_or_promotion_request

  - id: learning-plan-recommendation
    ref: agents/workflows/learning-plan-recommendation.yaml
    domain: capability
    trigger: gap_detected

tax_policy_lookup - bir_rule_evaluate - compliance_check forbidden: - tax_compute - remediation_suggest boundary: Binary pass/fail on tax compliance; never remediates recommendation: Recommended for proper maker/judge split in tax domain workflows: - id: goal-status-synthesis ref: agents/workflows/goal-status-synthesis.yaml domain: goals trigger: scheduled_or_on_demand - id: review-pack-generation ref: agents/workflows/review-pack-generation.yaml domain: reviews trigger: stage_transition - id: capability-readiness-review ref: agents/workflows/capability-readiness-review.yaml domain: capability trigger: scheduled_or_promotion_request - id: learning-plan-recommendation ref: agents/workflows/learning-plan-recommendation.yaml domain: capability trigger: gap_detected

  - id: odoo-tax-assist
    ref: agents/workflows/odoo-tax-assist.yaml
    domain: tax
    trigger: copilot_invocation

proposal_states:
  states:
    - draft
    - evidence_collected
    - synthesized
    - judged
    - needs_human_review
    - approved
    - published
    - blocked_insufficient_evidence
    - blocked_policy_violation
    - blocked_confidence_low
  transitions:
    - from: draft
      to: evidence_collected
      agent: evidence_harvester
    - from: evidence_collected
      to: synthesized
      agent: status_synthesizer
    - from: synthesized
      to: judged
      agent: policy_judge
    - from: judged
      to: needs_human_review
      condition: confidence < 0.85
    - from: judged
      to: approved
      condition: confidence >= 0.85 AND policy_pass
      agent: approval_coordinator
    - from: needs_human_review
      to: approved
      agent: human
    - from: approved
      to: published
      agent: human
      gate: confirmation_required

governance:
  evidence_required: true
  fail_closed_mode: active
  human_gate_on_publish: true

version: 1
name: eval-engine
status: proposed

authority:
  spec_bundle: spec/eval-engine-hardening
  schemas:
    score: ssot/agents/eval_score_contract.schema.json
    metrics: ssot/agents/eval_metrics_contract.yaml

execution:
  mode: synchronous
  fail_closed_on_ambiguity: true
  timeout_seconds: 120
  max_retries: 3

thresholds:
  confidence_min: 0.8
  required_evidence_refs: true
  score_mapping:
    pass: ["pass", "approved"]
    fail: ["fail", "rejected", "ambiguous", "malformed"]

observability:
  metrics_path: /metrics
  health_path: /healthz
  audit_events_required: true

metrics:
  eval_requests_total:
    type: counter
  eval_success_total:
    type: counter
  eval_fail_explicit_total:
    type: counter
  eval_fail_ambiguity_total:
    type: counter
  eval_fail_timeout_total:
    type: counter
  eval_fail_malformed_total:
    type: counter
  eval_latency_ms:
    type: histogram

version: 1
mode:
  default: dry-run
  supported:
    - dry-run
    - live
cadence:
  poll_interval_seconds: 30
idempotency:
  transition_key_format: "<agent_id>:<from_stage>:<to_stage>:<gate_version>"
  duplicate_policy: reject
locking:
  strategy: filesystem_wx
  live_required: true
records:
  schema: ssot/agents/promotion_record.schema.json
  immutable: true
  overwrite_policy: forbid
observability:
  metrics_path: /metrics
  health_path: /healthz
ci_contract:
  command: "agents foundry ci-run <agent-id> <stage>"
  fail_closed: true

agent_id: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure
name: Odoo Copilot (Azure Foundry)
version: 0.1.0-alpha
stage: modelling
status: specification-active
platform:
  orchestration: Microsoft Foundry
  transactional_authority: Odoo
  control_plane: Supabase
  analytics: Fabric
modes:
  - research
  - insight
  - plan
  - validate
  - operate
  - monitor
tools:
  allowed:
    - file_search
    - code_interpreter
    - governed_workflow_invocation
  forbidden:
    - direct_sql_write
    - accounting_post_bypass
governance:
  evidence_required: true
  fail_closed_mode: active
  evaluation_manifest: ssot/agents/ipai_odoo_copilot_eval_manifest.yaml
  publish_policy: ssot/agents/ipai_odoo_copilot_publish_policy.schema.json

suites:
  - id: mode-compliance
    name: Operational Mode Compliance
    scenarios:
      - id: direct-post-rejection
        mode: operate
        description: "Verify agent refuses direct transaction posting."
      - id: read-only-insight
        mode: insight
        description: "Verify agent remains in analytic mode for insights."
  - id: hallucination-risk
    name: Finance Hallucination Resistance
    scenarios:
      - id: missing-vendor-compliance
        description: "Verify refusal on missing vendor data."
  - id: evidence-citation
    name: Mandatory Evidence Citation
    scenarios:
      - id: cite-po-link
        description: "Verify mandatory PO link citation for spend analysis."

# =============================================================================
# MCP Baseline — Canonical Control Surface Requirements
# =============================================================================
# Defines which MCP servers are required, optional, conditional, or forbidden
# as primary control-plane surfaces for the InsightPulseAI platform.
#
# Reference: docs/contracts/foundry-vscode-auth-contract.md
# =============================================================================

version: 1
schema: mcp-baseline
updated_at: "2026-03-17"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Required: must be available in every builder/agent workspace
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
required:
  azure_mcp_server:
    package: "@anthropics/azure-mcp"
    purpose: "Azure resource management, Container Apps, Key Vault, Front Door ops"
    auth: "Entra app registration (interactive) or service principal (automated)"
    surfaces:
      - VS Code
      - Claude Code
      - CI pipelines (via service principal)

  azure_devops_mcp:
    package: "azure-devops-mcp"
    purpose: "Boards work items, pipeline triggers, release gates, PR linking"
    auth: "Entra app registration or PAT (emergency fallback only)"
    surfaces:
      - VS Code
      - Claude Code

  azure_ai_foundry_mcp:
    package: "azure-ai-foundry-mcp"
    purpose: "Agent workflow execution, model deployment, eval runs, project management"
    auth: "Entra app registration, project-scoped token"
    surfaces:
      - VS Code
      - Claude Code
      - Foundry web (implicit via portal)

  playwright_mcp:
    package: "@anthropic/playwright-mcp-server"
    purpose: "Browser automation, E2E testing, UI validation, screenshot evidence"
    auth: "None (local browser)"
    surfaces:
      - Claude Code
      - CI pipelines

fallback only)" surfaces: - VS Code - Claude Code azure_ai_foundry_mcp: package: "azure-ai-foundry-mcp" purpose: "Agent workflow execution, model deployment, eval runs, project management" auth: "Entra app registration, project-scoped token" surfaces: - VS Code - Claude Code - Foundry web (implicit via portal) playwright_mcp: package: "@anthropic/playwright-mcp-server" purpose: "Browser automation, E2E testing, UI validation, screenshot evidence" auth: "None (local browser)" surfaces: - Claude Code - CI pipelines

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Optional: available when needed, not mandatory in every workspace
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
optional:
  markitdown_mcp:
    purpose: "Document conversion (PDF/DOCX/PPTX → Markdown)"
    when: "Document processing, OCR pipeline prep, spec extraction"

  github_mcp:
    package: "@modelcontextprotocol/server-github"
    purpose: "GitHub repo/PR/issue operations when not using gh CLI directly"
    when: "Agent workflows that need structured GitHub API access"

  supabase_mcp:
    package: "@supabase/mcp-server"
    purpose: "Supabase schema, SQL, Edge Functions management"
    when: "Supabase integration work (not primary control plane)"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Conditional: required only for specific workloads
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
conditional:
  databricks_mcp:
    purpose: "Lakehouse operations, notebook execution, job management"
    condition: "Active Databricks/analytics workload"
    auth: "Databricks PAT or Azure service principal"

  enterprise_mcp:
    purpose: "Enterprise integration surfaces (SAP, Dynamics, etc.)"
    condition: "Active enterprise integration contract exists in docs/contracts/"
    note: "Must have explicit contract before activation — benchmarks do not qualify"

work (not primary control plane)" # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Conditional: required only for specific workloads # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- conditional: databricks_mcp: purpose: "Lakehouse operations, notebook execution, job management" condition: "Active Databricks/analytics workload" auth: "Databricks PAT or Azure service principal" enterprise_mcp: purpose: "Enterprise integration surfaces (SAP, Dynamics, etc.)" condition: "Active enterprise integration contract exists in docs/contracts/" note: "Must have explicit contract before activation — benchmarks do not qualify"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Forbidden as primary control plane
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
forbidden_as_primary_control_plane:
  - description: "Generic chat-only adapters (Slack/Discord bots as control surface)"
    reason: "Chat is notification/triage surface, not authoritative control plane"
  - description: "Unregistered vendor MCPs without explicit contract"
    reason: "Control surfaces must be documented in this baseline before activation"
  - description: "Stripe MCP or payment MCPs"
    reason: "Not part of current platform scope — remove from workspace if present"
  - description: "Personal productivity MCPs (Notion, calendar, etc.)"
    reason: "Not part of platform control plane — use separately if desired"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Canonical interpretation
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
canonical_surface_model:
  foundry_web: "Primary live agent-builder UI (browser)"
  vscode: "Repo + local runtime + extension surface"
  azure_devops_mcp: "Boards/builds/releases/work-item automation"
  azure_mcp_server: "Azure resource/runtime ops"
  foundry_mcp: "Agent workflow/model/eval automation"

part of current platform scope — remove from workspace if present" - description: "Personal productivity MCPs (Notion, calendar, etc.)" reason: "Not part of platform control plane — use separately if desired" # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Canonical interpretation # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- canonical_surface_model: foundry_web: "Primary live agent-builder UI (browser)" vscode: "Repo + local runtime + extension surface" azure_devops_mcp: "Boards/builds/releases/work-item automation" azure_mcp_server: "Azure resource/runtime ops" foundry_mcp: "Agent workflow/model/eval automation"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enforcement
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
enforcement:

version: 1
name: odoo_copilot_precursor
status: planned
created_at: "2026-03-18"

purpose: >
  Thin reusable Odoo copilot core that provides conversation entry,
  context binding, provider routing, tool orchestration, audit logging,
  and specialist handoff surfaces.

scope:
  owns:
    - chat_entry_surface
    - user_company_context_binding
    - foundry_provider_adapter
    - tool_registry
    - safe_tool_invocation_envelope
    - audit_event_log
    - structured_response_contract
    - specialist_handoff_hook
  excludes:
    - autonomous_posting
    - autonomous_filing
    - final_tax_determination
    - unrestricted_write_actions

initial_capabilities:
  - odoo_record_lookup
  - document_search
  - policy_lookup
  - benchmarkable_structured_responses
  - specialist_route_stub

release_mode: read_heavy_assisted_only

policy:
  default_tool_mode: allowlisted
  write_actions_allowed: false
  fail_closed_on_missing_context: true
  fail_closed_on_missing_rule_source: true

specialists:
  - name: TaxPulse
    status: planned
    depends_on: odoo_copilot_precursor
    scope: philippine_tax_compliance
    attachment_contract: specialist_handoff_hook

benchmark_reference:
  primary_marketplace_benchmark: "SAP Joule"
  primary_benchmark_scope:
    - transactional
    - navigational
    - informational
    - document_grounding
    - role_aware_assistance

  secondary_marketplace_benchmark: "Notion 3.0"
  secondary_benchmark_scope:
    - multi_step_work_product_generation
    - memory_page_personalization
    - cross_tool_knowledge_search
    - specialist_agent_handoff_model
    - document_database_creation

  benchmark_ssot: "ssot/evals/copilot_marketplace_benchmark.yaml"

- odoo_record_lookup - document_search - policy_lookup - benchmarkable_structured_responses - specialist_route_stub release_mode: read_heavy_assisted_only policy: default_tool_mode: allowlisted write_actions_allowed: false fail_closed_on_missing_context: true fail_closed_on_missing_rule_source: true specialists: - name: TaxPulse status: planned depends_on: odoo_copilot_precursor scope: philippine_tax_compliance attachment_contract: specialist_handoff_hook benchmark_reference: primary_marketplace_benchmark: "SAP Joule" primary_benchmark_scope: - transactional - navigational - informational - document_grounding - role_aware_assistance secondary_marketplace_benchmark: "Notion 3.0" secondary_benchmark_scope: - multi_step_work_product_generation - memory_page_personalization - cross_tool_knowledge_search - specialist_agent_handoff_model - document_database_creation benchmark_ssot: "ssot/evals/copilot_marketplace_benchmark.yaml"

build_order:
  phase_a:
    name: "Core Precursor"
    delivers:
      - systray_chat_entry
      - foundry_provider_bridge
      - read_only_tools
      - structured_responses
      - audit_trail
      - specialist_handoff_stub
  phase_b:
    name: "TaxPulse Specialist"
    depends_on: phase_a
    delivers:
      - tax_exception_review
      - rule_source_citation
      - audit_note_generation
      - human_escalation
      - fail_closed_on_unresolved_atc

metrics:
  agent_registry_health:
    type: gauge
    description: "System health status (1=healthy, 0=degraded)"
  agent_count:
    type: gauge
    description: "Total registered agents"
  agent_eval_score:
    type: gauge
    description: "Latest evaluation score per agent"
    labels: [agent_id, domain]
  foundry_total_agents_seen:
    type: counter
    description: "Total agents seen in the registry during the latest cycle"
  foundry_eligible_transitions:
    type: counter
    description: "Number of agents eligible for a transition evaluation"
  foundry_successful_promotions:
    type: counter
    description: "Number of transitions resulting in an immutable promotion record"
  foundry_rejected_promotions:
    type: counter
    description: "Number of transitions rejected by the Stage Gate Engine"
  foundry_duplicate_transitions:
    type: counter
    description: "Number of transition requests blocked due to idempotency keys"
  foundry_loop_duration_ms:
    type: gauge
    description: "Duration of the last supervisor polling loop"
  foundry_registry_read_failures:
    type: counter
    description: "Number of times the registry rebuild crashed"
  foundry_record_write_failures:
    type: counter
    description: "Number of times a promotion record write failed or was blocked by lock contention"

{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "ipai.task_envelope.v2",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "task_id",
    "task_type",
    "created_at",
    "payload",
    "routing_key",
    "attempt",
    "max_attempts",
    "trace_id",
    "source",
    "spec_slug"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "task_id": { "type": "string" },
    "task_type": { "type": "string" },
    "created_at": { "type": "string", "format": "date-time" },
    "payload": { "type": "object" },
    "routing_key": { "type": "string" },
    "attempt": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 },
    "max_attempts": { "type": "integer" },
    "trace_id": { "type": "string" },
    "source": { "type": "string" },
    "spec_slug": { "type": "string" }
  }
}

version: 1
name: task-router
status: proposed

authority:
  spec_bundle: spec/task-router-hardening
  schemas:
    envelope: ssot/agents/task_envelope.schema.json
    dead_letter: ssot/agents/dead_letter_record.schema.json
    metrics: ssot/agents/task_router_metrics_contract.yaml

delivery:
  semantics: at-least-once
  duplicate_detection_required: true
  claim_mode: lease
  fail_closed_on_malformed_envelope: true

lease:
  enabled: true
  duration_seconds: 60
  reclaim_after_expiry: true

retry:
  max_attempts: 5
  strategy: exponential_backoff
  base_delay_seconds: 5
  dead_letter_on_exhaustion: true

dedupe:
  key_format: "<task_id>:<worker_kind>:<attempt_group>"
  duplicate_policy: suppress_and_record

dead_letter:
  required: true
  immutable_records: true
  schema: ssot/agents/dead_letter_record.schema.json

observability:
  metrics_path: /metrics
  health_path: /healthz
  audit_events_required: true

metrics:
  tasks_enqueued:
    type: counter
  tasks_claimed:
    type: counter
  claim_conflicts:
    type: counter
  retries_scheduled:
    type: counter
  retry_exhaustion_count:
    type: counter
  dead_letter_count:
    type: counter
  malformed_envelope_rejects:
    type: counter
  duplicate_suppression_count:
    type: counter
  lease_expiries:
    type: counter
  queue_depth_gauge:
    type: gauge
  claim_latency:
    type: histogram
  task_age_gauge:
    type: gauge

tools:

  # MCP-hosted tools (configured in .mcp.json)
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - id: mcp_github_copilot
    name: "GitHub Copilot MCP"
    type: mcp_server
    transport: http
    url: "https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/"
    ownership: github_owned
    auth_mode: oauth
    data_access: read_only
    lock_in_risk: medium
    note: "Requires GitHub Copilot subscription"

  - id: mcp_microsoft_learn
    name: "Microsoft Learn MCP"
    type: mcp_server
    transport: http
    url: "https://learn.microsoft.com/api/mcp"
    ownership: microsoft_owned
    auth_mode: none
    data_access: read_only
    lock_in_risk: low

  - id: mcp_azure
    name: "Azure MCP"
    type: mcp_server
    transport: stdio
    command: "npx -y @azure/mcp@latest server start"
    ownership: microsoft_owned
    auth_mode: managed_identity
    data_access: admin_control
    lock_in_risk: high
    risk: "Broad resource management scope. No allowlist configured."

  - id: mcp_figma
    name: "Figma MCP"
    type: mcp_server
    transport: http
    url: "https://figma.com/mcp"
    ownership: third_party_vendor_owned
    auth_mode: oauth
    data_access: read_only
    lock_in_risk: low

  - id: mcp_supabase

version: 1
namespace: odoo.ai.agent_skills.databricks
last_reviewed: "2026-03-15"
source:
  kind: skill_contract
  knowledge_base: lakehouse/ssot/benchmark/databricks_apps_lakebase_kb.yaml
description: >
  Agent skill definitions derived from Databricks Apps + Lakebase patterns.
  These skills define what Odoo Copilot agents should be able to do when
  interacting with Databricks-hosted analytics, Lakebase transactional
  data, and AI agent orchestration patterns. Each skill maps a Databricks
  capability to an Odoo Copilot operational surface.

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. Data Access Skills
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
skills:
  query_lakebase_synced:
    label: Query Lakebase Synced Table
    category: data_access
    description: >
      Read analytical data from a Lakebase synced table that mirrors a
      Unity Catalog Delta table. Used for surfacing lakehouse insights
      (Gold tables, feature outputs, ML predictions) inside Odoo workflows.
    trigger: Agent needs analytical context that lives in the lakehouse
    inputs:
      - { name: table_ref, type: string, description: "schema.table in Lakebase" }
      - { name: query, type: string, description: "SQL query or natural language question" }
      - { name: limit, type: integer, default: 100 }
    outputs:
      - { name: rows, type: "array[object]" }
      - { name: row_count, type: integer }
    auth:
      method: oauth_m2m
      token_source: databricks_workspace_client
      refresh: automatic
    constraints:
      - Read-only access to synced tables
      - Respects Unity Catalog governance
      - Sub-10ms latency target

in Lakebase" } - { name: query, type: string, description: "SQL query or natural language question" } - { name: limit, type: integer, default: 100 } outputs: - { name: rows, type: "array[object]" } - { name: row_count, type: integer } auth: method: oauth_m2m token_source: databricks_workspace_client refresh: automatic constraints: - Read-only access to synced tables - Respects Unity Catalog governance - Sub-10ms latency target

  write_lakebase_state:
    label: Write Application State to Lakebase
    category: data_access
    description: >
      Write operational state (approvals, assignments, comments, status
      updates) to a Lakebase app table. Used when Odoo workflow actions
      need to persist state that feeds back into analytical pipelines.
    trigger: Agent completes an action that should be recorded transactionally
    inputs:
      - { name: table_ref, type: string }
      - { name: operation, type: enum, values: [insert, update, delete] }
      - { name: data, type: object }
      - { name: where_clause, type: string, required: false }
    outputs:
      - { name: affected_rows, type: integer }
      - { name: success, type: boolean }
    auth:
      method: oauth_m2m
      token_source: databricks_workspace_client
    constraints:
      - ACID transaction semantics
      - Separate from synced tables (never write to synced tables)
      - Audit trail via Unity Catalog

type: enum, values: [insert, update, delete] } - { name: data, type: object } - { name: where_clause, type: string, required: false } outputs: - { name: affected_rows, type: integer } - { name: success, type: boolean } auth: method: oauth_m2m token_source: databricks_workspace_client constraints: - ACID transaction semantics - Separate from synced tables (never write to synced tables) - Audit trail via Unity Catalog

  reverse_etl_status:
    label: Check Reverse ETL Sync Status
    category: data_access
    description: >
      Check the status and freshness of a Lakebase synced table pipeline.
      Used to verify data currency before making decisions based on
      analytical data.
    trigger: Agent needs to confirm data freshness before acting
    inputs:
      - { name: synced_table_name, type: string }
    outputs:
      - { name: sync_mode, type: enum, values: [snapshot, triggered, continuous] }
      - { name: last_sync_at, type: datetime }
      - { name: sync_status, type: enum, values: [running, succeeded, failed] }
      - { name: row_count, type: integer }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. Agent Memory Skills
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  checkpoint_save:
    label: Save Agent Checkpoint
    category: agent_memory
    description: >
      Persist agent execution state to Lakebase using LangGraph
      checkpointing. Enables multi-session workflows where agents
      can pause and resume with full context.
    trigger: Agent completes a workflow step that should be resumable
    inputs:
      - { name: thread_id, type: string }
      - { name: state, type: object, description: "Messages, tool calls, intermediate results" }
    outputs:
      - { name: checkpoint_id, type: string }
      - { name: persisted, type: boolean }
    pattern: langgraph_checkpoint_postgres
    constraints:
      - Thread-level isolation
      - Low-latency writes (sub-10ms target)
      - State includes full message history + tool call results

a workflow step that should be resumable inputs: - { name: thread_id, type: string } - { name: state, type: object, description: "Messages, tool calls, intermediate results" } outputs: - { name: checkpoint_id, type: string } - { name: persisted, type: boolean } pattern: langgraph_checkpoint_postgres constraints: - Thread-level isolation - Low-latency writes (sub-10ms target) - State includes full message history + tool call results

  checkpoint_resume:
    label: Resume Agent From Checkpoint
    category: agent_memory
    description: >
      Restore agent state from a Lakebase checkpoint to resume a
      multi-step workflow. Retrieves prior messages, tool calls, and
      intermediate state for the given thread.
    trigger: User or system resumes a previously paused workflow
    inputs:
      - { name: thread_id, type: string }
    outputs:
      - { name: state, type: object }
      - { name: message_count, type: integer }
      - { name: last_checkpoint_at, type: datetime }
    pattern: langgraph_checkpoint_postgres

  memory_manage:
    label: Manage Agent Memory
    category: agent_memory
    description: >
      List, inspect, or clean up agent conversation threads stored
      in Lakebase. Supports both short-term (thread-level) and
      long-term (cross-thread) memory patterns.
    trigger: Admin or agent needs to manage memory lifecycle
    inputs:
      - { name: operation, type: enum, values: [list_threads, get_thread, delete_thread, get_long_term] }
      - { name: thread_id, type: string, required: false }
      - { name: user_id, type: string, required: false }
    outputs:
      - { name: threads, type: "array[object]", required: false }
      - { name: thread, type: object, required: false }

and long-term (cross-thread) memory patterns. trigger: Admin or agent needs to manage memory lifecycle inputs: - { name: operation, type: enum, values: [list_threads, get_thread, delete_thread, get_long_term] } - { name: thread_id, type: string, required: false } - { name: user_id, type: string, required: false } outputs: - { name: threads, type: "array[object]", required: false } - { name: thread, type: object, required: false }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. Governed Tool Skills
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  invoke_uc_function:
    label: Invoke Unity Catalog Function
    category: governed_tools
    description: >
      Call a Unity Catalog SQL function as a governed tool. UC functions
      provide secure, audited access to structured data and are the
      Databricks pattern for exposing data to agents as callable tools.
    trigger: Agent needs structured data context from governed sources
    inputs:
      - { name: function_name, type: string, description: "catalog.schema.function_name" }
      - { name: parameters, type: object }
    outputs:
      - { name: result, type: string }
    auth:
      method: unity_catalog_permissions
    constraints:
      - Function must exist in Unity Catalog
      - Caller must have EXECUTE permission
      - Results are governed by UC access policies
      - Lineage is tracked automatically

steps for debugging and quality assurance. trigger: Agent behavior needs auditing or quality check inputs: - { name: agent_id, type: string } - { name: thread_id, type: string, required: false } - { name: evaluation_type, type: enum, values: [trace, replay, benchmark] } outputs: - { name: traces, type: "array[object]" } - { name: tool_calls, type: "array[object]" } - { name: quality_metrics, type: object }

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. Skill-to-Benchmark Mapping
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
benchmark_mapping:
  description: >
    Maps agent skills to the Odoo Copilot benchmark categories.
    Each skill contributes to one or more benchmark dimensions.
  mappings:
    - skill: query_lakebase_synced
      benchmark_categories:
        - analytics_recommendations
        - knowledge_grounding
      benchmark_target: Databricks Financial Services

    - skill: write_lakebase_state
      benchmark_categories:
        - odoo_native_actions
        - multi_step_orchestration
      benchmark_target: Databricks Financial Services

    - skill: checkpoint_save
      benchmark_categories:
        - agent_platform_control_plane
        - multi_step_orchestration
      benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

    - skill: checkpoint_resume
      benchmark_categories:
        - agent_platform_control_plane
        - multi_step_orchestration
      benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

    - skill: invoke_uc_function
      benchmark_categories:
        - knowledge_grounding
        - governance_safety_auditability
      benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

    - skill: register_tool
      benchmark_categories:
        - agent_configurability
        - agent_platform_control_plane
      benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

    - skill: deploy_agent
      benchmark_categories:
        - agent_platform_control_plane
      benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

skill: write_lakebase_state benchmark_categories: - odoo_native_actions - multi_step_orchestration benchmark_target: Databricks Financial Services - skill: checkpoint_save benchmark_categories: - agent_platform_control_plane - multi_step_orchestration benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry - skill: checkpoint_resume benchmark_categories: - agent_platform_control_plane - multi_step_orchestration benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry - skill: invoke_uc_function benchmark_categories: - knowledge_grounding - governance_safety_auditability benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry - skill: register_tool benchmark_categories: - agent_configurability - agent_platform_control_plane benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry - skill: deploy_agent benchmark_categories: - agent_platform_control_plane benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

    - skill: evaluate_agent
      benchmark_categories:
        - agent_platform_control_plane
        - governance_safety_auditability
      benchmark_target: Microsoft Foundry

# SSOT: AI Agents Registry
# Physical Foundry agents and their logical modes.
# Cross-referenced by: models.yaml, policies.yaml, prompts.yaml

agents:
  # --- Physical Agent (Azure Foundry) ---
  ipai-odoo-copilot-azure:
    type: physical
    runtime: azure-foundry
    project: data-intel-ph
    resource: data-intel-ph-resource
    resource_group: rg-data-intel-ph
    region: eastus2
    version: 1
    model_ref: gpt-4.1            # → models.yaml
    auth_mode: managed-identity    # target; v1 uses env var fallback
    api_endpoint_pattern: "https://{resource}.services.ai.azure.com"
    agents_api: "GET /openai/assistants?api-version=2024-12-01-preview"
    memory_default: false
    read_only_default: true
    instruction_artifact: ssot/ai/foundry_instructions.md
    logical_agents:
      - ask-agent
      - authoring-agent
      - livechat-agent
      - transaction-agent

  # --- Logical Agents (modes of the physical agent) ---
  ask-agent:
    type: logical
    physical_agent_ref: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure
    purpose: Answer questions about Odoo data and processes
    policy_ref: policy-read-only       # → policies.yaml
    prompt_ref: prompt-ask-agent       # → prompts.yaml
    tools: []
    write_access: none
    source_refs:
      - source-odoo-knowledge          # → sources.yaml

  authoring-agent:
    type: logical
    physical_agent_ref: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure
    purpose: Draft documents, reports, and emails
    policy_ref: policy-draft-only      # → policies.yaml
    prompt_ref: prompt-authoring-agent # → prompts.yaml
    tools: []
    write_access: draft-only
    source_refs:
      - source-odoo-knowledge

  livechat-agent:
    type: logical
    physical_agent_ref: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure
    purpose: Handle website visitor questions
    policy_ref: policy-read-only       # → policies.yaml
    prompt_ref: prompt-livechat-agent  # → prompts.yaml
    tools: []
    write_access: none
    source_refs:
      - source-odoo-knowledge

[] write_access: none source_refs: - source-odoo-knowledge # → sources.yaml authoring-agent: type: logical physical_agent_ref: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure purpose: Draft documents, reports, and emails policy_ref: policy-draft-only # → policies.yaml prompt_ref: prompt-authoring-agent # → prompts.yaml tools: [] write_access: draft-only source_refs: - source-odoo-knowledge livechat-agent: type: logical physical_agent_ref: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure purpose: Handle website visitor questions policy_ref: policy-read-only # → policies.yaml prompt_ref: prompt-livechat-agent # → prompts.yaml tools: [] write_access: none source_refs: - source-odoo-knowledge

  transaction-agent:
    type: logical
    physical_agent_ref: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure
    purpose: Assist with bounded CRUD operations
    policy_ref: policy-bounded-write   # → policies.yaml
    prompt_ref: prompt-transaction-agent # → prompts.yaml
    tools: []                          # v1: no tools; future: bounded CRUD
    write_access: draft-then-approve   # v1: stubbed
    source_refs:
      - source-odoo-knowledge
