text:
schema_version: 1
kind: foundry_python_sdk_surfaces

scope:
  language: python
  applies_to:
    - microsoft_foundry
    - azure_ai_services_tools
    - odoo_foundry_bridge

endpoint_policy:
  foundry_project_endpoint:
    pattern: "https://<resource-name>.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/<project-name>"
    purpose:
      - project_native_foundry_operations
      - agents
      - evaluations
      - tracing
      - project_scoped_openai_compatible_client

  openai_compatibility_endpoint:
    pattern: "https://<resource-name>.openai.azure.com/openai/v1/"
    purpose:
      - maximum_openai_api_compatibility
      - compatibility_first_model_calls

  services_tools_base_endpoint:
    pattern: "https://<resource-name>.services.ai.azure.com/"
    purpose:
      - resource_scoped_service_access
      - endpoint_discovery
      - tool_connection_lookup

  note: >
    Foundry resources expose the project endpoint and OpenAI-compatible access patterns.
    Azure OpenAI resources expose only the /openai/v1 endpoint.

authentication_policy:
  default:
    credential: DefaultAzureCredential
    package: azure-identity
    posture: entra_first
  compatibility_exception:
    allowed_for:
      - openai_v1_api_key_flows
    note: api keys are exception-path only for compatibility flows

sdk_surfaces:
  foundry_project_sdk:
    canonical: true
    package_family:
      - azure-ai-projects
      - azure-identity
    optional_companion:
      - openai
    client_types:
      - project_client
      - openai_compatible_client_from_project
    responsibilities:
      - project_properties
      - connections
      - tracing
      - agents
      - evaluations
      - fine_tuning
      - foundry_direct_models_via_responses_api
    version_policy:
      foundry_new_portal:
        package: "azure-ai-projects>=2.0.0"
        status: preview
      foundry_classic:
        package: "azure-ai-projects==1.0.0"
        status: stable

authentication_policy: default: credential: DefaultAzureCredential package: azure-identity posture: entra_first compatibility_exception: allowed_for: - openai_v1_api_key_flows note: api keys are exception-path only for compatibility flows sdk_surfaces: foundry_project_sdk: canonical: true package_family: - azure-ai-projects - azure-identity optional_companion: - openai client_types: - project_client - openai_compatible_client_from_project responsibilities: - project_properties - connections - tracing - agents - evaluations - fine_tuning - foundry_direct_models_via_responses_api version_policy: foundry_new_portal: package: "azure-ai-projects>=2.0.0" status: preview foundry_classic: package: "azure-ai-projects==1.0.0" status: stable

  foundry_tools_services:
    canonical: true
    package_family_policy: service_specific
    services:
      - speech
      - content_safety
      - vision
      - language
      - translator
      - document_intelligence
      - azure_ai_search
    package_name_source_of_truth: microsoft_sdk_package_resources_reference
    note: >
      Keep exact per-service package names sourced from the official Microsoft
      package reference. Do not invent umbrella package names in this SSOT file.

  openai_compatibility_sdk:
    canonical: conditional
    package_family:
      - openai
    use_when:
      - maximum_openai_compatibility_required
      - direct_openai_api_surface_needed
    not_default_for:
      - foundry_project_management
      - foundry_native_setup
      - project_connections
      - tracing_configuration

guardrails:
  - do_not_collapse_all_python_ai_packages_into_one_foundry_sdk_label
  - do_not_use_openai_sdk_as_default_control_surface_for_foundry_native_project_operations
  - do_not_mix_foundry_classic_and_foundry_new_portal_package_guidance_without_explicit_decision
  - do_not_promote_preview_foundry_new_portal_packages_to_production_default_without_exception_record

vision - language - translator - document_intelligence - azure_ai_search package_name_source_of_truth: microsoft_sdk_package_resources_reference note: > Keep exact per-service package names sourced from the official Microsoft package reference. Do not invent umbrella package names in this SSOT file. openai_compatibility_sdk: canonical: conditional package_family: - openai use_when: - maximum_openai_compatibility_required - direct_openai_api_surface_needed not_default_for: - foundry_project_management - foundry_native_setup - project_connections - tracing_configuration guardrails: - do_not_collapse_all_python_ai_packages_into_one_foundry_sdk_label - do_not_use_openai_sdk_as_default_control_surface_for_foundry_native_project_operations - do_not_mix_foundry_classic_and_foundry_new_portal_package_guidance_without_explicit_decision - do_not_promote_preview_foundry_new_portal_packages_to_production_default_without_exception_record

production_policy:
  default_runtime_track: foundry_classic_stable_until_exception_approved
  preview_usage_requires_exception: true
  exception_record_must_include:
    - business_reason
    - target_environment
    - rollback_plan
    - package_version_pin

references:
  microsoft_foundry_sdk_overview: "official"
  microsoft_sdk_package_resources_reference: "official"

auth:

    source: microsoft_foundry_portal_catalog_observation

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FOUNDRY PLATFORM FRAMING
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#
# Microsoft positions Foundry as a unified end-to-end platform, not a single
# product. The blog post (2026-05) and sample repo below are reference material
# only — the sample is a JS/TS buildathon quest, not a production baseline.
#
# References:
#   - Blog: https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/azure-ai-foundry-blog/microsoft-foundry-an-end-to-end-platform-for-building-governing-and-scaling-ai/4496736
#   - Sample: https://github.com/microsoft/microsoft-foundry-e2e-js (learning reference only)

platform_framing:
  portal_surface: ai.azure.com
  sdk_mode: code_first
  lifecycle_stages:
    - selection
    - optimization
    - observability
    - security
  notes: >
    IPAI uses the SDK path exclusively. Portal is for exploration and
    evaluation, not runtime authority. The Microsoft sample repo is a
    buildathon learning reference, not a deployment template.

app:

text:
# SSOT: Gmail Add-on Integration Contract
# Defines the add-on surfaces, backend endpoints, Odoo operations, and operational rules.
# CI guard: .github/workflows/gmail-addon-contract.yml
# Last updated: 2026-03-28

addon_name: "InsightPulseAI for Gmail"
version: "1.0.0"

supported_surfaces:
  - surface: "homepage"
    trigger: "homepageTrigger"
    function: "homepage"
    description: "User opens the add-on panel in Gmail."

  - surface: "contextual_message"
    trigger: "contextualTriggers.unconditional"
    function: "onGmailMessage"
    description: "User opens an email message."

  - surface: "compose_action"
    trigger: "composeTrigger"
    function: "onCompose"
    description: "User composes or replies to an email."

card_entrypoints:
  - name: "homepage"
    surface: "homepage"
    returns: "Session status, quick actions, Odoo connection health."

  - name: "contextual_partner_lookup"
    surface: "contextual_message"
    returns: "Partner info, related leads, invoices, tasks for the email sender."

  - name: "contextual_unknown_sender"
    surface: "contextual_message"
    returns: "Unknown contact card with Create Contact action."

  - name: "create_lead_form"
    surface: "contextual_message"
    returns: "Pre-filled lead creation form (name from subject, email from sender)."

  - name: "create_ticket_form"
    surface: "contextual_message"
    returns: "Pre-filled ticket creation form with project selection."

  - name: "create_expense_form"
    surface: "contextual_message"
    returns: "Pre-filled expense form with optional OCR data."

  - name: "log_note_form"
    surface: "contextual_message"
    returns: "Record selector and note preview for email logging."

  - name: "compose_link"
    surface: "compose_action"
    returns: "Link outgoing email to an Odoo record."

backend_base_url: "PLACEHOLDER"
odoo_base_url: "https://erp.insightpulseai.com"

form (name from subject, email from sender)." - name: "create_ticket_form" surface: "contextual_message" returns: "Pre-filled ticket creation form with project selection." - name: "create_expense_form" surface: "contextual_message" returns: "Pre-filled expense form with optional OCR data." - name: "log_note_form" surface: "contextual_message" returns: "Record selector and note preview for email logging." - name: "compose_link" surface: "compose_action" returns: "Link outgoing email to an Odoo record." backend_base_url: "PLACEHOLDER" odoo_base_url: "https://erp.insightpulseai.com"

odoo_operations:
  - name: "partner_lookup"
    endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/context"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "res.partner"
    classification: "read"
    description: "Look up Odoo partner by sender email address."
    audit_required: false

  - name: "lead_create"
    endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/actions/create_lead"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "crm.lead"
    classification: "write"
    description: "Create a CRM lead from email context."
    audit_required: true
    idempotency_key: "source_message_id"

  - name: "ticket_create"
    endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/actions/create_ticket"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "project.task"
    classification: "write"
    description: "Create a project task from email context."
    audit_required: true
    idempotency_key: "source_message_id"

  - name: "activity_log"
    endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/actions/log_note"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "mail.message"
    classification: "write"
    description: "Log an email as a note on an Odoo record."
    audit_required: true
    idempotency_key: "source_message_id+model+record_id"

  - name: "expense_create"
    endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/actions/create_expense"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "hr.expense"
    classification: "write"
    description: "Create an expense entry from a receipt email."
    audit_required: true
    idempotency_key: "source_message_id"

classification: "write" description: "Create a project task from email context." audit_required: true idempotency_key: "source_message_id" - name: "activity_log" endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/actions/log_note" method: "POST" odoo_model: "mail.message" classification: "write" description: "Log an email as a note on an Odoo record." audit_required: true idempotency_key: "source_message_id+model+record_id" - name: "expense_create" endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/actions/create_expense" method: "POST" odoo_model: "hr.expense" classification: "write" description: "Create an expense entry from a receipt email." audit_required: true idempotency_key: "source_message_id"

  - name: "contact_create"
    endpoint: "/jsonrpc"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "res.partner"
    classification: "write"
    description: "Create a new partner from an unknown email sender."
    audit_required: true
    idempotency_key: "sender_email"

  - name: "session_create"
    endpoint: "/ipai/mail_plugin/session"
    method: "POST"
    odoo_model: "res.users"
    classification: "privileged"
    description: "Create an authenticated Odoo session for the mapped user."
    audit_required: true

fallback_behaviors:
  - condition: "odoo_unreachable"
    behavior: "Display 'Service unavailable' card with retry button."
    retry: true

  - condition: "no_odoo_account"
    behavior: "Display 'No linked Odoo account' card with admin contact link."
    retry: false

  - condition: "access_denied"
    behavior: "Display 'Insufficient permissions' card with explanation."
    retry: false

  - condition: "partner_not_found"
    behavior: "Display 'Unknown contact' card with Create Contact button."
    retry: false

  - condition: "session_expired"
    behavior: "Backend auto-creates new session and retries the operation."
    retry: true

  - condition: "rate_limited"

# SSOT: Google OAuth Consent Screen Configuration
# Source of truth for the OAuth consent screen associated with the Gmail add-on.
# CI guard: .github/workflows/marketplace-metadata.yml
# Last updated: 2026-03-28

app_type: "web_application"

branding:
  app_name: "InsightPulseAI for Gmail"
  logo_url: "https://erp.insightpulseai.com/web/static/img/logo.png"
  homepage_url: "https://insightpulseai.com"
  privacy_url: "https://insightpulseai.com/privacy"
  tos_url: "https://insightpulseai.com/terms"

user_support_email: "support@insightpulseai.com"
developer_contact_email: "ops@insightpulseai.com"

authorized_domains:
  - "insightpulseai.com"

scopes:
  - scope: "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly"
    sensitivity: "sensitive"
    purpose: >-
      Read sender email address and subject line of the currently open message
      for Odoo partner lookup and contextual card rendering.
    data_stored: false
    justification: >-
      The add-on reads only the sender email and subject of the currently open
      message. No bulk email access. No email content stored.

  - scope: "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.addons.current.message.readonly"
    sensitivity: "non_sensitive"
    purpose: "Read metadata of the currently open message for contextual card rendering."
    data_stored: false

  - scope: "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.addons.current.action.compose"
    sensitivity: "non_sensitive"
    purpose: "Interact with the compose window for email linking and log actions."
    data_stored: false

  - scope: "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.addons.execute"
    sensitivity: "non_sensitive"
    purpose: "Execute add-on card actions within the Gmail sidebar."
    data_stored: false

  - scope: "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.external_request"
    sensitivity: "non_sensitive"
    purpose: "Make HTTPS requests to the Odoo integration backend."
    data_stored: false

# SSOT: AgentOps Policy
# Cross-referenced by: docs/architecture/AGENTOPS_DOCTRINE.md
# Updated: 2026-03-24

version: "1.0.0"

release_doctrine:
  evaluation_gated: true
  mandatory_rule: >
    No assistant surface reaches production without passing its evaluation pack.

rollout_model:
  stages:
    - id: pre_merge_ci
      gate: lint_typecheck_unit_yaml_validation
      automated: true
    - id: staging_validation
      gate: eval_pack_pass_integration_smoke_manual_review
      automated: false
    - id: gated_production
      gate: canary_feature_flag_blue_green
      automated: partial

safe_rollout_strategies:
  canary:
    when: agent_model_or_prompt_changes
    default: true
  feature_flag:
    when: new_capabilities_gradual_exposure
  blue_green:
    when: infrastructure_changes

observability:
  loop: observe_act_evolve
  required_signals:
    logs:
      format: structured_json
      destination: app_insights
    traces:
      mechanism: correlation_ids
      scope: mcp_a2a_calls
    metrics:
      items:
        - p95_response_latency
        - error_rate
        - eval_score
        - groundedness_score

  required_metrics:
    p95_latency_advisory:
      target_ms: 5000
      alert_threshold: 10000
    p95_latency_action:
      target_ms: 10000
      alert_threshold: 20000
    error_rate:
      target_pct: 1.0
      alert_threshold_pct: 5.0
    eval_score:
      staging_gate: 0.70
      block_deploy: 0.60
    groundedness_score:
      target: 0.80
      alert_threshold: 0.65

interop_doctrine:
  direct_call:
    when: simple_single_step_work
    preferred: true
  mcp:
    when: structured_reusable_tool_access
    use_cases:
      - odoo_record_crud
      - azure_resource_queries
      - databricks_sql
      - github_operations
  a2a:
    when: complex_cross_assistant_delegation
    use_cases:
      - diva_to_odoo_copilot_erp_execution
      - studio_to_document_intelligence_extraction
    current_state: not_implemented
    note: Diva modes are internal routing, not true A2A yet.

required_metrics: p95_latency_advisory: target_ms: 5000 alert_threshold: 10000 p95_latency_action: target_ms: 10000 alert_threshold: 20000 error_rate: target_pct: 1.0 alert_threshold_pct: 5.0 eval_score: staging_gate: 0.70 block_deploy: 0.60 groundedness_score: target: 0.80 alert_threshold: 0.65 interop_doctrine: direct_call: when: simple_single_step_work preferred: true mcp: when: structured_reusable_tool_access use_cases: - odoo_record_crud - azure_resource_queries - databricks_sql - github_operations a2a: when: complex_cross_assistant_delegation use_cases: - diva_to_odoo_copilot_erp_execution - studio_to_document_intelligence_extraction current_state: not_implemented note: Diva modes are internal routing, not true A2A yet.

registry_policy:
  current: ssot_yaml_files
  custom_registry_when:
    - more_than_10_active_surfaces
    - more_than_50_registered_tools
    - multi_team_concurrent_development
  note: Registries deferred until scale justifies them.

# AI Capability Consolidation — Microsoft Foundry Gateway
# All AI capabilities route through a single Foundry agent.
# Human doc: docs/architecture/AI_CONSOLIDATION_FOUNDRY.md
#
# Rebrand: Azure AI Foundry → Microsoft Foundry (2025-11)
# API: Assistants API → Responses API (Agents v2)
# SDK: azure-ai-projects 2.x + OpenAI() against one project endpoint
# Terminology: Threads→Conversations, Messages→Items, Runs→Responses

version: "2.0"
schema: ssot.governance.ai-consolidation-foundry.v2
updated_at: "2026-03-15"

metadata.title: AI Capability Consolidation — Microsoft Foundry Gateway

text:
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Foundry Coordinates (Microsoft Foundry — formerly Azure AI Foundry)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
foundry:
  brand: "Microsoft Foundry"
  portal: "https://ai.azure.com"
  resource: data-intel-ph-resource.services.ai.azure.com
  project: data-intel-ph
  agent: ipai-odoo-copilot-azure
  agent_versions: 7
  agent_type: prompt
  model_deployment: gpt-4.1
  api:
    surface: "Responses API (Agents v2)"
    version: "v1 stable routes (/openai/v1/)"
    sdk: "azure-ai-projects>=2.0.0"
    client: "OpenAI()"
    project_endpoint: "https://data-intel-ph-resource.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/data-intel-ph"
    openai_endpoint: "https://data-intel-ph-resource.openai.azure.com/openai/v1/"
    auth_scope: "https://ai.azure.com/.default"
  sdk_install:
    python: "pip install azure-ai-projects>=2.0.0 azure-identity openai"
    node: "npm install @azure/ai-projects@beta @azure/identity dotenv"
    dotnet: "dotnet add package Azure.AI.Projects --prerelease && dotnet add package Azure.AI.Projects.OpenAI --prerelease"
  sdk_usage: |
    # Python — dual client pattern (project + OpenAI-compatible)
    from azure.identity import DefaultAzureCredential
    from azure.ai.projects import AIProjectClient
    project = AIProjectClient(endpoint=PROJECT_ENDPOINT, credential=DefaultAzureCredential())
    openai = project.get_openai_client()
    response = openai.responses.create(model="gpt-4.1", input="...")
  sdk_notes:
    - "2.x SDK targets Foundry (new) portal; 1.x targets Foundry classic"
    - "Project client for Foundry-native ops (connections, tracing, eval)"
    - "OpenAI client for agents, models, fine-tuning (Responses API)"
    - "DefaultAzureCredential handles auth; api_key fallback on /openai/v1"
  terminology:
    session: conversation        # was: thread
    message: item                # was: message
    execution: response          # was: run
    agent_def: agent_version     # was: assistant
  search_service: srch-ipai-dev
  auth:
    primary: managed_identity
    fallback: api_key
    source: azure_key_vault

metadata.title: AI Capability Consolidation — Microsoft Foundry Gateway

text:
targets Foundry (new) portal; 1.x targets Foundry classic" - "Project client for Foundry-native ops (connections, tracing, eval)" - "OpenAI client for agents, models, fine-tuning (Responses API)" - "DefaultAzureCredential handles auth; api_key fallback on /openai/v1" terminology: session: conversation # was: thread message: item # was: message execution: response # was: run agent_def: agent_version # was: assistant search_service: srch-ipai-dev auth: primary: managed_identity fallback: api_key source: azure_key_vault

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Consolidation Doctrine
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
doctrine: >
  One Foundry agent. One Odoo bridge module. Three logical agents + one router workflow.
  Foundry is the control plane (prompt agent, datasets, evaluations, tracing).
  Agent Framework is the execution plane (ops agent, actions agent, router workflow).
  APIM is the production front door. Capability packs (Databricks, fal, Marketing)
  attach inside agents — they are never standalone agents.
  All AI surface area routes through Microsoft Foundry as the single
  inference gateway. No direct OpenAI, Gemini, or Supabase LLM calls.
  Agent tools connect via MCP, OpenAPI, or A2A protocols.

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Target State (3 agents + 1 workflow)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Canonical doc: docs/architecture/COPILOT_TARGET_STATE.md
# SSOT matrices: infra/ssot/agents/agent_capability_matrix.yaml
#                infra/ssot/platform/agent_ingress_matrix.yaml
# Spec kit:      spec/odoo-copilot-agent-framework/
target_state:
  components:
    - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-advisory
      form: foundry_prompt_agent
      plane: control
      write_access: none
      packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production, marketing_strategy]

metadata.title: AI Capability Consolidation — Microsoft Foundry Gateway

text:
Foundry as the single inference gateway. No direct OpenAI, Gemini, or Supabase LLM calls. Agent tools connect via MCP, OpenAPI, or A2A protocols. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Target State (3 agents + 1 workflow) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Canonical doc: docs/architecture/COPILOT_TARGET_STATE.md # SSOT matrices: infra/ssot/agents/agent_capability_matrix.yaml # infra/ssot/platform/agent_ingress_matrix.yaml # Spec kit: spec/odoo-copilot-agent-framework/ target_state: components: - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-advisory form: foundry_prompt_agent plane: control write_access: none packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production, marketing_strategy]

    - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-ops
      form: agent_framework_agent
      plane: execution
      write_access: none
      packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production, marketing_strategy]

    - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-actions
      form: agent_framework_agent
      plane: execution
      write_access: bounded_crud
      packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production]

    - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-router
      form: agent_framework_workflow
      plane: execution
      write_access: none
      packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production]

  production_ingress: apim_ai_gateway
  physical_agents: 1
  logical_agents: 3
  workflows: 1

text:
# Spec kit: spec/odoo-copilot-agent-framework/ target_state: components: - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-advisory form: foundry_prompt_agent plane: control write_access: none packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production, marketing_strategy] - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-ops form: agent_framework_agent plane: execution write_access: none packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production, marketing_strategy] - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-actions form: agent_framework_agent plane: execution write_access: bounded_crud packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production] - name: ipai-odoo-copilot-router form: agent_framework_workflow plane: execution write_access: none packs: [databricks_intelligence, fal_creative_production] production_ingress: apim_ai_gateway physical_agents: 1 logical_agents: 3 workflows: 1

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Legacy Capability Modes (DEPRECATED — replaced by target_state above)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# The five-mode model (ask, authoring, livechat, transaction, creative) is
# superseded by the three-agent + one-router model defined in target_state.
# Retained here as migration reference only — do not extend.
legacy_capability_modes:
  _deprecated: true
  _replaced_by: target_state
  _migration_map:
    ask: advisory           # ask → advisory agent (read-only, user-facing)
    livechat: advisory      # livechat → advisory agent (read-only, user-facing)
    authoring_read: ops     # authoring read/analysis → ops agent (internal)
    authoring_write: actions # authoring draft creation → actions agent (bounded writes)
    transaction: actions    # transaction → actions agent (bounded writes)
    creative: actions       # creative → actions agent (bounded writes, fal pack)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
platform_capabilities:
  tool_catalog:
    total_tools: 1400+
    tool_types:
      built_in:
        - web_search                 # GA — real-time web grounding
        - code_interpreter           # GA — sandboxed Python
        - file_search                # GA — vector search on uploads
        - function_calling           # GA — custom function execution
        - azure_ai_search            # GA — search index grounding
        - image_generation           # Preview — DALL-E via Foundry
        - browser_automation         # Preview — natural language browser tasks
        - computer_use               # Preview — UI interaction
        - fabric                     # Preview — Microsoft Fabric data agent
        - sharepoint                 # Preview — chat with SharePoint docs
      custom:
        - mcp                        # GA — Model Context Protocol servers
        - openapi                    # GA — any OpenAPI 3.0/3.1 spec
        - agent_to_agent             # Preview — A2A cross-agent calls

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Foundry Tools (Odoo-side executors)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
foundry_tools:
  read_only:
    - id: search_records
      description: "Search Odoo records by model + domain"
      odoo_method: "env[model].search_read(domain, fields, limit)"
      write: false

    - id: read_record
      description: "Read specific record by ID"
      odoo_method: "env[model].browse(id).read(fields)"
      write: false

    - id: search_knowledge
      description: "Search knowledge base / RAG index"
      odoo_method: "Foundry search index (srch-ipai-dev)"
      write: false

  write_bounded:
    - id: create_draft
      description: "Create record in draft state only"
      odoo_method: "env[model].create(vals)"
      write: true
      constraint: "state must be 'draft'"

    - id: create_record
      description: "Create record (transaction mode only)"
      odoo_method: "env[model].create(vals)"
      write: true
      constraint: "allowed_models whitelist"

    - id: update_record
      description: "Update record fields (transaction mode only)"
      odoo_method: "env[model].browse(id).write(vals)"
      write: true
      constraint: "allowed_models + allowed_fields whitelist"

metadata.title: AI Capability Consolidation — Microsoft Foundry Gateway

text:
RAG index" odoo_method: "Foundry search index (srch-ipai-dev)" write: false write_bounded: - id: create_draft description: "Create record in draft state only" odoo_method: "env[model].create(vals)" write: true constraint: "state must be 'draft'" - id: create_record description: "Create record (transaction mode only)" odoo_method: "env[model].create(vals)" write: true constraint: "allowed_models whitelist" - id: update_record description: "Update record fields (transaction mode only)" odoo_method: "env[model].browse(id).write(vals)" write: true constraint: "allowed_models + allowed_fields whitelist"

    - id: execute_action
      description: "Execute server action (transaction mode only)"
      odoo_method: "env[model].browse(id).action_*()"
      write: true
      constraint: "allowed_actions whitelist + approval gate"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Safety Controls
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
safety:
  read_only_default: true
  write_requires_approval: true
  audit_all_tool_calls: true
  telemetry: azure_app_insights
  rate_limit: "60 requests/minute per user"
  max_tokens_per_request: 4096
  pii_redaction: true
  model_allowlist:
    - gpt-4.1
    - gpt-4.1-mini
  mcp_auth:
    preferred: managed_identity    # Entra token rotation, no secret mgmt
    supported:
      - key_based                  # API key via project connection
      - entra_identity             # managed identity
      - oauth_passthrough          # per-user consent
  content_safety: azure_ai_content_safety
  prompt_injection_detection: true

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Migration Path
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
migration:
  phase_1:
    name: "Foundry ask + authoring modes"
    status: active
    modules_deprecated: []
    note: "ipai_odoo_copilot already handles ask + authoring"

text:
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Microsoft Agent Stack (upstream repos)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Three complementary layers that power Foundry agent capabilities.
# These are the canonical upstream repos — never fork, only consume as SDK.
agent_stack:
  orchestration:
    repo: "github.com/microsoft/agent-framework"
    purpose: "Multi-agent workflows, graph-based orchestration, OpenTelemetry"
    sdks:
      python_standalone: "pip install agent-framework --pre"
      python_hosted: "pip install azure-ai-agentserver-agentframework"
      dotnet: "dotnet add package Microsoft.Agents.AI"
    patterns:
      - sequential: "Agent pipeline (A → B → C)"
      - group_chat: "Dynamic context-based handoff"
      - human_in_the_loop: "Approval / clarification gates"
    features:
      - graph_based_workflows
      - streaming_and_checkpointing
      - time_travel_debugging
      - opentelemetry_distributed_tracing
      - middleware_pipelines
    declarative_workflow:
      description: "Low-code YAML workflows — prototype in portal, edit in VS Code for Web"
      authoring:
        - "Foundry portal → Build → Workflows (visual builder)"
        - "VS Code for Web → YAML editor + visual graph side-by-side"
      conversion: "GitHub Copilot converts YAML → Agent Framework code (Python/C#)"
      testing: "Remote Agent Playground in VS Code extension"
      deployment: "Deploy from ellipsis menu → saves back to Foundry"
      prerequisite: "GitHub Copilot subscription (for YAML → code conversion)"
    hosted_workflow:
      description: "Pro-code hosted agent workflows deployed to Foundry workspace"
      vs_code_extension: "TeamsDevApp.vscode-ai-foundry"
      project_structure:
        - ".env (AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT, AZURE_AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME)"
        - "workflow.py (orchestration logic + agent definitions)"
        - "container.py (containerized deployment entry point)"
        - "main.py (local dev entry point)"
      observability: |
        from agent_framework.observability import setup_observability
        setup_observability(vs_code_extension_port=4319)
      deployment:
        local: "F5 in VS Code (Debug Local Workflow HTTP Server)"
        container: "Microsoft Foundry: Open Container Agent Playground Locally"
        cloud: "Microsoft Foundry: Deploy Hosted Agent"
      auth: "DefaultAzureCredential (az login / managed identity)"
      rbac_required:
        - "Azure AI User"
        - "AcrPull (for container deployment)"
    our_usage:
      - "Foundry workflow orchestration for multi-step ERP tasks"
      - "Expense approval: Agent → Manager Approval → Finance Review"
      - "Month-end close: Sequential agent pipeline across GL/AP/AR"
      - "PO workflow: Draft → Review → Approve → Send (human-in-the-loop)"
    status: planned

# =============================================================================
# Azure Boards Execution Hierarchy — InsightPulse AI
# =============================================================================
#
# Repo-side SSOT for the Azure Boards work item hierarchy.
# This file seeds Azure Boards when ADR-GSR-001 graduation gates pass.
#
# Native hierarchy (Basic process): Epic → Issue → Task
#   - Epic = strategic objective / thematic grouping
#   - Issue = scoped requirement or workstream (NOT "Feature" — Basic process
#     uses "Issue" as the middle tier, equivalent to Feature in Agile/Scrum)
#   - Task = concrete deliverable unit
#
# Planning/coordination layer: Delivery Plans + Area Paths + Iteration Paths
#                              + Dashboards + Dependency Links
#
# Azure Boards is the execution coordination system of record for strategic
# objectives, scoped workstreams, concrete tasks, team ownership, iteration
# cadence, area ownership, dependency visibility, Delivery Plans, portfolio
# rollups, dashboards/reporting, and timeline views. Detailed specs,
# architecture doctrine, SSOT files, and runtime evidence remain in the repo.
#
# Constraint: Boards hold the goal record, execution hierarchy, accountable
# owner, measurable acceptance, and links. Full PRDs, architecture doctrine,
# target-state SSOT, and module contracts stay in spec/, docs/architecture/,
# and ssot/ — never in Boards.
#
# Cross-references:
#   - ssot/governance/platform-strategy-2026.yaml (strategy objectives)
#   - ssot/governance/enterprise_okrs.yaml (operational OKRs)
#   - ssot/governance/operating-model.yaml (tool authority)
#   - ADR-GSR-001 (goals SoR decision)
#
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/backlogs/define-features-epics
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/backlogs/backlogs-overview
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/plans/?view=azure-devops
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/github/features-timeline
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/devops/plan/scaling-agile
# =============================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Every Epic/Issue must have:
#   title:                Deterministic name ([OBJ-NNN] or [FEAT])
#   description:          Purpose, Scope, Out of scope, Why this matters
#   acceptance_criteria:  Measurable completion rules only
#   links:                Spec bundle, architecture docs, SSOT files, PRs
#   owner:                Accountable role
#   target_iteration:     Sprint or quarter
#   tags:                 From stable tag set
#
# Task-level items use: [TASK] design | build | validate | deploy | evidence capture

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Team Topology & Operating Model
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/devops/plan/scaling-agile
# Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/plans/agile-culture

"Engineering lead, product lead" widgets: - "Sprint burndown (current iteration)" - "Issue cycle time" - "Dependency graph" - "Upcoming milestones" - name: "Operational Dashboard" audience: "Engineering lead (day-to-day)" widgets: - "My assigned items" - "Recently completed" - "Items missing acceptance criteria" - "Stale items (no update >14 days)" # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Team Topology & Operating Model # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/devops/plan/scaling-agile # Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/plans/agile-culture

team_topology:
  principle: "Scale with teams, not projects"
  description: >
    Prefer vertical (value-stream) teams aligned to area paths over
    horizontal (functional) teams. Each team owns a slice of the product
    from backlog to production. Teams are the unit of scale — when work
    exceeds capacity, add a team rather than expanding an existing one.

  team_shape:
    preferred: vertical-value-stream
    size: "6-9 people per team (current: 1 — solo operator model)"
    note: >
      Current operating model is single-developer. Team topology guidance
      is documented now so the structure scales correctly when headcount
      grows. Solo-operator maps to all area paths with platform-lead role.

  management_coordination_lane:
    description: >
      A lightweight management/program coordination lane provides portfolio
      views, cross-team dependency resolution, and stakeholder reporting
      without owning delivery. In the solo-operator model, this is the
      same person wearing a different hat during sprint boundaries.
    responsibilities:
      - "Portfolio backlog grooming (Epic-level prioritization)"
      - "Cross-area dependency resolution"
      - "Stakeholder reporting (Leadership Dashboard)"
      - "Iteration cadence governance (sprint start/end ceremonies)"
      - "Risk and blocker escalation"

management_coordination_lane: description: > A lightweight management/program coordination lane provides portfolio views, cross-team dependency resolution, and stakeholder reporting without owning delivery. In the solo-operator model, this is the same person wearing a different hat during sprint boundaries. responsibilities: - "Portfolio backlog grooming (Epic-level prioritization)" - "Cross-area dependency resolution" - "Stakeholder reporting (Leadership Dashboard)" - "Iteration cadence governance (sprint start/end ceremonies)" - "Risk and blocker escalation"

cadence_and_communications:
  description: >
    Shared sprint cadence and communication rituals ensure alignment
    across area paths without heavyweight process overhead.
  # Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/devops/plan/scaling-agile

  shared_sprint_cadence:
    length: 14_days
    alignment: "All area paths share the same sprint boundaries"
    rationale: >
      Shared cadence simplifies cross-area dependency management and
      enables organization-wide sprint reviews. Teams (or the solo
      operator) plan and demo on the same rhythm.

  ceremonies:
    - name: "Sprint Planning"
      frequency: "Every 14 days (sprint start)"
      purpose: "Select Issues/Tasks for the sprint from the backlog"
      attendees: "Team members (or solo operator)"
      duration: "1 hour"

    - name: "Sprint Demo / Showcase"
      frequency: "Every 14 days (sprint end)"
      purpose: "Demonstrate completed work, gather feedback"
      attendees: "Team + stakeholders"
      duration: "30 minutes"
      note: "Record evidence in docs/evidence/<stamp>/"

    - name: "Retrospective"
      frequency: "Every 14 days (sprint end)"
      purpose: "Process improvement, blocker review"
      attendees: "Team members"
      duration: "30 minutes"

the sprint from the backlog" attendees: "Team members (or solo operator)" duration: "1 hour" - name: "Sprint Demo / Showcase" frequency: "Every 14 days (sprint end)" purpose: "Demonstrate completed work, gather feedback" attendees: "Team + stakeholders" duration: "30 minutes" note: "Record evidence in docs/evidence/<stamp>/" - name: "Retrospective" frequency: "Every 14 days (sprint end)" purpose: "Process improvement, blocker review" attendees: "Team members" duration: "30 minutes"

    - name: "Coordination Meeting"
      frequency: "Weekly (mid-sprint)"
      purpose: "Cross-area risks, dependencies, and blockers"
      attendees: "Management coordination lane"
      duration: "15 minutes"
      note: >
        In solo-operator model, this is a structured self-review of the
        dependency graph and blocker list.

cross_team_visibility:
  description: >
    Cross-team visibility is achieved through Delivery Plans (portfolio
    backlogs across area paths), dashboards, and dependency links —
    not through status meetings or status reports.
  # Ref: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/plans/visibility-across-teams

  mechanisms:
    - tool: "Delivery Plans"
      purpose: "Timeline view of Issues across all area paths and iterations"
      audience: "Management coordination lane, stakeholders"

    - tool: "Portfolio Backlogs"
      purpose: "Epic-level rollup of Issue completion across teams"
      audience: "Leadership"

    - tool: "Dashboards"
      purpose: "Real-time widget-based views (see dashboards section above)"
      audience: "All roles"

    - tool: "Dependency Links"
      purpose: "Predecessor/Successor links surface cross-area blockers"
      audience: "Teams, coordination lane"

quality_risk_contract:
  description: >
    Lightweight quality and risk communication contract. Ensures risks
    and quality issues surface early without bureaucratic overhead.

coordination lane, stakeholders" - tool: "Portfolio Backlogs" purpose: "Epic-level rollup of Issue completion across teams" audience: "Leadership" - tool: "Dashboards" purpose: "Real-time widget-based views (see dashboards section above)" audience: "All roles" - tool: "Dependency Links" purpose: "Predecessor/Successor links surface cross-area blockers" audience: "Teams, coordination lane" quality_risk_contract: description: > Lightweight quality and risk communication contract. Ensures risks and quality issues surface early without bureaucratic overhead.

  risk_communication:
    - trigger: "Item blocked for >3 days"
      action: "Escalate to coordination lane (add Blocked By link + comment)"
    - trigger: "Acceptance criteria unclear or missing"
      action: "Flag in Operational Dashboard (stale items widget)"
    - trigger: "Cross-area dependency at risk"
      action: "Raise in weekly coordination meeting"
    - trigger: "Sprint goal at risk (>30% incomplete at mid-sprint)"
      action: "Scope negotiation in coordination meeting"

  quality_gates:
    - gate: "Issue completion"
      criteria: "All acceptance criteria met + evidence captured"
    - gate: "Epic completion"
      criteria: "All child Issues complete + acceptance criteria met"
    - gate: "Sprint completion"
      criteria: "Demo delivered + retrospective held + dashboard updated"

  definition_of_done:
    - "Acceptance criteria verified with evidence"
    - "Links to PRs, specs, or evidence docs present"
    - "No open Blocked By links"
    - "Dashboard widgets reflect current state"

version: "1.0"
schema: ssot.governance.azdo-alignment.v1
updated_at: "2026-03-14"

organization: insightpulseai

projects:
  - name: ipai-platform
    purpose: platform-control-runtime
    repos:
      - odoo
      - infra
      - ops-platform
      - agents
      - .github
      - automations
      - web
    service_connections:
      - sc-azure-dev-platform
    agent_pools:
      - ipai-build-pool
    variable_groups:
      - name: vg-ipai-platform-secrets
        key_vault: kv-ipai-dev
        open_to_all_pipelines: false

  - name: lakehouse
    purpose: databricks-analytics
    repos:
      - lakehouse
    service_connections:
      - sc-azure-dev-lakehouse
    agent_pools:
      - ipai-build-pool
    variable_groups:
      - name: vg-ipai-lakehouse-secrets
        key_vault: kv-ipai-dev
        open_to_all_pipelines: false
    databricks_workspace: dbw-ipai-dev

github_primary: true
azure_devops_role: selective-execution-surface

agent_pools:
  - name: ipai-build-pool
    resource_group: rg-ipai-devops
    type: self-hosted
    shared_across_projects: true

dev_center:
  name: ipai-devcenter
  resource_group: rg-ipai-devops

service_connection_policy:
  auth_mechanism: workload-identity-federation
  long_lived_secrets: false
  cross_project_sharing: false
  protected_resource: true
  require_approvals: true

secret_management:
  backend: azure-key-vault
  vault: kv-ipai-dev
  secrets_in_git: false
  secrets_in_yaml: false
  secrets_in_logs: false

# =============================================================================
# Azure DevOps Project Model — SSOT

#
# Canonical definition of the Azure DevOps project structure for IPAI.
# Single project, single organization. All repos live in GitHub.
#
# Decision basis: ssot/governance/platform-authority-split.yaml (Option C)
# Authority map: ssot/governance/ado_github_authority_map.yaml
#
# Last updated: 2026-03-30
# =============================================================================

schema_version: "1.0"
last_updated: "2026-03-30"
owner: "platform-architecture"
status: "approved"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Organization & Project
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
organization:
  name: insightpulseai
  url: https://dev.azure.com/insightpulseai

project:
  name: ipai-platform
  url: https://dev.azure.com/insightpulseai/ipai-platform
  process_template: Agile
  visibility: private
  description: >
    Unified planning, pipeline, and environment surface for the InsightPulse AI
    platform. Code authority lives in GitHub; AzDO owns planning (Boards) and
    gated deploys (Pipelines) per Option C.

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Teams
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
teams:
  - name: ipai-platform Team
    description: Default team — all members
    is_default: true

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Area Paths (11 domains)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
area_paths:
  - path: "ipai-platform"
    description: Root area — unassigned items
  - path: "ipai-platform\\ERP"
    description: Odoo CE 19 + IPAI addons + OCA
    github_repo: odoo
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Agents"
    description: Agent skills, evals, knowledge base
    github_repo: agents
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Agents\\Runtime"
    description: Agent orchestration runtime engine
    github_repo: agent-platform
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Data"
    description: Databricks lakehouse, ETL, BI
    github_repo: data-intelligence
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Infra"
    description: Shared IaC (Bicep, Terraform)
    github_repo: infra
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Design"
    description: Design tokens, component library
    github_repo: design
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Platform"
    description: Control-plane services
    github_repo: platform
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Web"
    description: Web apps, ops console, landing pages
    github_repo: web
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Docs"
    description: Documentation site (MkDocs)
    github_repo: docs
  - path: "ipai-platform\\Mobile"
    description: iOS/Android apps
    github_repo: mobile
  - path: "ipai-platform\\MCP"
    description: MCP server implementations
    github_repo: mcp

board_views:
  # Execution views
  - name: Execution Board
    type: flat
    description: All active work items (In Progress + New) across all area paths
    filter: "State IN ('New', 'Active', 'Resolved') AND Iteration Path UNDER @CurrentIteration"

  - name: Roadmap
    type: tree
    description: Epics and Features with child items, ordered by priority
    filter: "Work Item Type IN ('Epic', 'Feature') AND State <> 'Closed'"

  # Domain views (10)
  - name: "ERP Domain"
    type: flat
    description: Work items under ERP area path
    area_path: "ipai-platform\\ERP"

  - name: "Agents Domain"
    type: flat
    description: Work items under Agents area path (includes Runtime)
    area_path: "ipai-platform\\Agents"

  - name: "Data Domain"
    type: flat
    description: Work items under Data area path
    area_path: "ipai-platform\\Data"

  - name: "Infra Domain"
    type: flat
    description: Work items under Infra area path
    area_path: "ipai-platform\\Infra"

  - name: "Design Domain"
    type: flat
    description: Work items under Design area path
    area_path: "ipai-platform\\Design"

  - name: "Platform Domain"

  - name: "MCP Domain"

    filter: "State IN ('New', 'Active') AND Assigned To = ''"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  "ipai-platform\\Agents\\Runtime": agent-platform

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pipeline Folders
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
pipeline_folders:
  - path: "deploy/"
    description: Production and staging deployment pipelines (ACA, Databricks, Infra)
    pipelines:
      - odoo-deploy
      - odoo-container-deploy
      - databricks-deploy
      - databricks-bundles-promote
      - web-landing-deploy
      - infra-deploy
      - foundry-runtime-ci  # includes staging deploy stage

  - path: "ci/"
    description: CI validation pipelines (asset validation, not code CI — code CI is GHA)
    pipelines:
      - databricks-bundles-ci
      - evals-validation
      - foundry-runtime-pr
      - docs-validation

  - path: "eval/"
    description: AI evaluation gate pipelines
    pipelines:
      - odoo-module-governed  # includes eval gate stage

  - path: "infra/"
    description: Infrastructure-as-code pipelines
    pipelines:
      - infra-deploy

- databricks-bundles-promote - web-landing-deploy - infra-deploy - foundry-runtime-ci # includes staging deploy stage - path: "ci/" description: CI validation pipelines (asset validation, not code CI — code CI is GHA) pipelines: - databricks-bundles-ci - evals-validation - foundry-runtime-pr - docs-validation - path: "eval/" description: AI evaluation gate pipelines pipelines: - odoo-module-governed # includes eval gate stage - path: "infra/" description: Infrastructure-as-code pipelines pipelines: - infra-deploy

  - path: "deprecated/"
    description: Deprecated pipelines awaiting deletion
    pipelines:
      - azure-pipelines-ci  # root CI — superseded by GHA
      - agent-platform-ci   # redirected to platform/ci/
      - agent-platform-pr   # redirected to platform/ci/
      - ipai-landing-upgrade # merged into ipai-landing deploy
      - web-landing-deploy-inline  # superseded by template version

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Artifact Feeds
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
artifact_feeds: []
# No Azure Artifacts feeds configured. Container images go to ACR (acripaiodoo,
# ipaiodoodevacr). Python packages are pip-installed from PyPI or inline.

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Approval Policies
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
approval_policies:
  staging:
    type: auto
    description: >
      Staging environments auto-approve on successful build + validation.
      No human gate required.

  production:
    type: manual
    description: >
      Production environments require manual approval from platform-architecture.
      Approval is enforced via AzDO environment checks.
    approvers: ["platform-architecture"]
    timeout_hours: 72
    instructions: >
      Confirm: staging validation passed, rollback path exists, bake-time
      policy satisfied, linked work item present.

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Retention Policies
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
retention_policies:
  pipeline_runs:
    days: 365
    description: Keep all pipeline run metadata for 1 year

validation. No human gate required. production: type: manual description: > Production environments require manual approval from platform-architecture. Approval is enforced via AzDO environment checks. approvers: ["platform-architecture"] timeout_hours: 72 instructions: > Confirm: staging validation passed, rollback path exists, bake-time policy satisfied, linked work item present. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Retention Policies # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- retention_policies: pipeline_runs: days: 365 description: Keep all pipeline run metadata for 1 year

  build_artifacts:
    days: 90
    description: Retain build artifacts (logs, published outputs) for 90 days

  release_artifacts:
    days: 365
    description: Release/deployment artifacts retained for 1 year

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Linkage Rules
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
linkage:
  pr_tag_pattern: "AB#<work_item_id>"
  mandatory_paths:
    - "addons/"
    - "agents/"
    - "infra/"
  enforcement: ".github/workflows/planning-index-ssot-check.yml"
  ado_repos_disabled: true
  single_project_rule: "All work in ipai-platform. No additional ADO projects."

# =============================================================================
# Azure DevOps Runtime Contract — Executable SSOT
# =============================================================================
#
# Defines every AzDO runtime resource (environments, service connections,
# variable groups, Key Vault bindings, identities, branch policies, gates,
# and evidence outputs) required for the deploy-authority lanes.
#
# Parent SSOTs:
#   - ssot/governance/platform-authority-split.yaml (Option C decision)
#   - ssot/governance/ci-cd-authority-matrix.yaml (per-repo CI/CD assignment)
#   - ssot/governance/repo-delivery-disposition.yaml (per-repo disposition)
#   - ssot/contracts/identity.yaml (deploy identity principals)
#
# Evidence contracts:
#   - docs/architecture/CI_CD_RUNTIME_TOPOLOGY.md (template spine, evidence)
#   - docs/architecture/DELIVERY_READINESS.md (four-stage deploy pattern)
#
# Last updated: 2026-03-30
# =============================================================================

schema_version: "1.0"
last_updated: "2026-03-30"
owner: "platform-architecture"
status: "approved"

organization: insightpulseai
project: ipai-platform

# =============================================================================
# Environments
# =============================================================================
# Each environment maps to an AzDO Environment resource used for approval gates.
# Ref: DELIVERY_READINESS.md §Promotion Policy
# =============================================================================
environments:

identity principals) # # Evidence contracts: # - docs/architecture/CI_CD_RUNTIME_TOPOLOGY.md (template spine, evidence) # - docs/architecture/DELIVERY_READINESS.md (four-stage deploy pattern) # # Last updated: 2026-03-30 # ============================================================================= schema_version: "1.0" last_updated: "2026-03-30" owner: "platform-architecture" status: "approved" organization: insightpulseai project: ipai-platform # ============================================================================= # Environments # ============================================================================= # Each environment maps to an AzDO Environment resource used for approval gates. # Ref: DELIVERY_READINESS.md §Promotion Policy # ============================================================================= environments:

  - name: odoo-dev
    purpose: "Odoo CE 19 development — continuous deploy from main, no approval gate"
    approval_required: false
    approvers: []
    deployment_gates:
      - gate_type: smoke
        criteria: "HTTP 200 on erp.insightpulseai.com/web/login, body contains 'Odoo'"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
    evidence_outputs:
      - artifact_name: odoo-dev-evidence
        contents: "image digest, ACA revision ID, smoke HTTP status, commit SHA"
        retention_days: 90

  - name: odoo-staging
    purpose: "Odoo CE 19 staging — pre-production validation with manual approval"
    approval_required: true
    approvers: ["platform-leads"]
    deployment_gates:
      - gate_type: approval
        criteria: "At least 1 approver from platform-leads"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: smoke
        criteria: "HTTP 200 on staging ERP endpoint, body contains 'Odoo', no 'Internal Server Error'"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
    evidence_outputs:
      - artifact_name: odoo-staging-evidence
        contents: "image digest, ACA revision ID, smoke HTTP status, commit SHA, approval record"
        retention_days: 90

CE 19 staging — pre-production validation with manual approval" approval_required: true approvers: ["platform-leads"] deployment_gates: - gate_type: approval criteria: "At least 1 approver from platform-leads" failure_behavior: block_deploy - gate_type: smoke criteria: "HTTP 200 on staging ERP endpoint, body contains 'Odoo', no 'Internal Server Error'" failure_behavior: block_deploy evidence_outputs: - artifact_name: odoo-staging-evidence contents: "image digest, ACA revision ID, smoke HTTP status, commit SHA, approval record" retention_days: 90

  - name: odoo-production
    purpose: "Odoo CE 19 production — gated deploy with mandatory approval"
    approval_required: true
    approvers: ["platform-leads", "erp-owner"]
    deployment_gates:
      - gate_type: approval
        criteria: "At least 1 approver from platform-leads AND erp-owner"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: preceding_environment
        criteria: "odoo-staging smoke must be green within last 24h"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: smoke
        criteria: "HTTP 200 on erp.insightpulseai.com/web/login, body contains 'Odoo', no 'Internal Server Error'"
        failure_behavior: mark_failed_rollback
    evidence_outputs:
      - artifact_name: odoo-prod-evidence
        contents: "image digest, ACA revision ID, smoke HTTP status, commit SHA, approval record, rollback revision"
        retention_days: 180

approval criteria: "At least 1 approver from platform-leads AND erp-owner" failure_behavior: block_deploy - gate_type: preceding_environment criteria: "odoo-staging smoke must be green within last 24h" failure_behavior: block_deploy - gate_type: smoke criteria: "HTTP 200 on erp.insightpulseai.com/web/login, body contains 'Odoo', no 'Internal Server Error'" failure_behavior: mark_failed_rollback evidence_outputs: - artifact_name: odoo-prod-evidence contents: "image digest, ACA revision ID, smoke HTTP status, commit SHA, approval record, rollback revision" retention_days: 180

  - name: databricks-staging
    purpose: "Databricks bundle staging — validate and deploy to staging workspace"
    approval_required: true
    approvers: ["data-leads"]
    deployment_gates:
      - gate_type: approval
        criteria: "At least 1 approver from data-leads"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: bundle_validate
        criteria: "databricks bundle validate succeeds with no errors"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
    evidence_outputs:
      - artifact_name: databricks-staging-evidence
        contents: "bundle validate output, deploy log, commit SHA"
        retention_days: 90

  - name: databricks-prod
    purpose: "Databricks bundle production — promote from staging with approval"
    approval_required: true
    approvers: ["data-leads", "platform-leads"]
    deployment_gates:
      - gate_type: approval
        criteria: "At least 1 approver from data-leads AND platform-leads"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: preceding_environment
        criteria: "databricks-staging deploy must be green"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: smoke
        criteria: "SQL warehouse returns SUCCEEDED on test query"
        failure_behavior: mark_failed_rollback
    evidence_outputs:
      - artifact_name: databricks-prod-evidence
        contents: "bundle deploy output, warehouse smoke result, commit SHA, approval record"
        retention_days: 180

staging with approval" approval_required: true approvers: ["data-leads", "platform-leads"] deployment_gates: - gate_type: approval criteria: "At least 1 approver from data-leads AND platform-leads" failure_behavior: block_deploy - gate_type: preceding_environment criteria: "databricks-staging deploy must be green" failure_behavior: block_deploy - gate_type: smoke criteria: "SQL warehouse returns SUCCEEDED on test query" failure_behavior: mark_failed_rollback evidence_outputs: - artifact_name: databricks-prod-evidence contents: "bundle deploy output, warehouse smoke result, commit SHA, approval record" retention_days: 180

  - name: platform-staging
    purpose: "Platform control-plane staging — ACA services, infra validation"
    approval_required: true
    approvers: ["platform-leads"]
    deployment_gates:
      - gate_type: approval
        criteria: "At least 1 approver from platform-leads"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
      - gate_type: bicep_whatif
        criteria: "Bicep what-if shows no destructive changes without explicit approval"
        failure_behavior: block_deploy
    evidence_outputs:
      - artifact_name: platform-staging-evidence
        contents: "Bicep what-if output, ACA revision IDs, smoke results, commit SHA"
        retention_days: 90

# =============================================================================
# Service Connections
# =============================================================================
# Ref: platform-authority-split.yaml §authority.odoo_deploy, §authority.databricks_deploy
# Ref: ssot/contracts/identity.yaml §deploy_identities.azure_devops
# =============================================================================
service_connections:

deployment_gates: - gate_type: approval criteria: "At least 1 approver from platform-leads" failure_behavior: block_deploy - gate_type: bicep_whatif criteria: "Bicep what-if shows no destructive changes without explicit approval" failure_behavior: block_deploy evidence_outputs: - artifact_name: platform-staging-evidence contents: "Bicep what-if output, ACA revision IDs, smoke results, commit SHA" retention_days: 90 # ============================================================================= # Service Connections # ============================================================================= # Ref: platform-authority-split.yaml §authority.odoo_deploy, §authority.databricks_deploy # Ref: ssot/contracts/identity.yaml §deploy_identities.azure_devops # ============================================================================= service_connections:

  - name: azure-ipai
    type: ARM (workload identity federation)
    scope: "Azure subscription — ACA, ACR, Key Vault, Bicep deployments"
    used_by:
      - odoo-container-deploy
      - azure-infra-deploy
      - web-landing-deploy
      - databricks-bundles-promote
    identity: "ae2df138 (InsightPulseAI Azure DevOps Automation)"

  - name: github-insightpulseai
    type: GitHub
    scope: "GitHub org Insightpulseai — source checkout, status reporting"
    used_by:
      - odoo-container-deploy
      - databricks-bundles-ci
      - databricks-bundles-promote
      - azure-infra-deploy
      - web-landing-deploy
    identity: "GitHub service connection (PAT or GitHub App)"

deployments" used_by: - odoo-container-deploy - azure-infra-deploy - web-landing-deploy - databricks-bundles-promote identity: "ae2df138 (InsightPulseAI Azure DevOps Automation)" - name: github-insightpulseai type: GitHub scope: "GitHub org Insightpulseai — source checkout, status reporting" used_by: - odoo-container-deploy - databricks-bundles-ci - databricks-bundles-promote - azure-infra-deploy - web-landing-deploy identity: "GitHub service connection (PAT or GitHub App)" # ============================================================================= # Variable Groups # ============================================================================= # Ref: CI_CD_RUNTIME_TOPOLOGY.md §Execution Preconditions # ============================================================================= variable_groups:

  - name: azure-ipai-config

    contents_description: >
      Non-secret configuration: Azure subscription ID, resource group names,
      ACR login server, ACA environment name, region, Front Door endpoint.
      Does NOT contain secrets — secrets are resolved at runtime via Key Vault.
    secret: false

# =============================================================================
# Protected Branches
# =============================================================================
# Branch policies enforced on the source repo (GitHub). AzDO respects these
# via the github-insightpulseai service connection checkout.
# =============================================================================
protected_branches:

  - branch: main
    policy: "Require PR, no direct push"
    required_reviewers: 1
    status_checks:
      - "platform-authority-check"
      - "ssot-yaml-lint"
      - "addon-governance"
      - "ab-linkage-check (on mandatory paths)"

  - branch: "release/*"
    policy: "Require PR, no direct push"
    required_reviewers: 1
    status_checks:
      - "platform-authority-check"
      - "ssot-yaml-lint"

# =============================================================================
# Deployment Gates
# =============================================================================
# Four-stage contract: Build/Validate -> Deploy -> Smoke -> Evidence
# Ref: DELIVERY_READINESS.md §Pipeline Stages
# =============================================================================
deployment_gates:

  - stage: Build/Validate
    gate_type: build
    criteria: "ACR image builds successfully OR bundle validate passes"
    failure_behavior: "Blocks all downstream stages"

  - stage: Deploy
    gate_type: deploy
    criteria: "ACA revision activated and healthy OR bundle deploy succeeds"
    failure_behavior: "Blocks Smoke stage"

"ssot-yaml-lint" # ============================================================================= # Deployment Gates # ============================================================================= # Four-stage contract: Build/Validate -> Deploy -> Smoke -> Evidence # Ref: DELIVERY_READINESS.md §Pipeline Stages # ============================================================================= deployment_gates: - stage: Build/Validate gate_type: build criteria: "ACR image builds successfully OR bundle validate passes" failure_behavior: "Blocks all downstream stages" - stage: Deploy gate_type: deploy criteria: "ACA revision activated and healthy OR bundle deploy succeeds" failure_behavior: "Blocks Smoke stage"

  - stage: Smoke
    gate_type: smoke
    criteria: "HTTP health check passes (status + content match) OR SQL warehouse test succeeds"
    failure_behavior: "Marks release as failed; triggers alert"

  - stage: Evidence
    gate_type: evidence
    criteria: "JSON artifact published with SHA, image ref, timestamp, smoke result"
    failure_behavior: "Always runs (succeededOrFailed condition); failure is non-blocking but logged"

# =============================================================================
# Evidence Outputs
# =============================================================================
# Ref: CI_CD_RUNTIME_TOPOLOGY.md §Evidence Contract
# Ref: DELIVERY_READINESS.md §Evidence Artifact
# =============================================================================
evidence_outputs:

  - artifact_name: deploy-evidence
    contents: >
      JSON artifact containing: surface name, timestamp (ISO8601), build number,
      commit SHA, image reference (ACR digest), smoke URL, smoke HTTP status,
      content match result, pipeline name, ACA revision ID (if applicable),
      bundle deploy output (if applicable).
    retention_days: 90

but logged" # ============================================================================= # Evidence Outputs # ============================================================================= # Ref: CI_CD_RUNTIME_TOPOLOGY.md §Evidence Contract # Ref: DELIVERY_READINESS.md §Evidence Artifact # ============================================================================= evidence_outputs: - artifact_name: deploy-evidence contents: > JSON artifact containing: surface name, timestamp (ISO8601), build number, commit SHA, image reference (ACR digest), smoke URL, smoke HTTP status, content match result, pipeline name, ACA revision ID (if applicable), bundle deploy output (if applicable). retention_days: 90

  - artifact_name: deploy-evidence-prod
    contents: >
      Same as deploy-evidence plus: approval record (approver, timestamp),
      preceding environment evidence reference, rollback revision ID.
    retention_days: 180

  - artifact_name: bicep-whatif
    contents: >
      Bicep what-if output showing planned resource changes.
      Used for infra deploy approval gate review.
    retention_days: 90

# =============================================================================

# =============================================================================
pipeline_environment_map:

  - pipeline: odoo-container-deploy
    yaml_path: azure-pipelines/odoo-container-deploy.yml
    environments: [odoo-dev, odoo-staging, odoo-production]
    service_connection: azure-ipai
    domain: Odoo

  - pipeline: databricks-bundles-ci
    yaml_path: azure-pipelines/databricks-bundles-ci.yml
    environments: []  # CI only, no deploy environment
    service_connection: azure-ipai
    domain: Data

  - pipeline: databricks-bundles-promote
    yaml_path: azure-pipelines/databricks-bundles-promote.yml

  - pipeline: azure-infra-deploy

  - pipeline: web-landing-deploy

# Blockers / Preconditions

preconditions:

[databricks-staging, databricks-prod] service_connection: azure-ipai domain: Data - pipeline: azure-infra-deploy yaml_path: infra/ci/azure-pipelines.yml environments: [platform-staging] service_connection: azure-ipai domain: Infra - pipeline: web-landing-deploy yaml_path: azure-pipelines/web-landing-deploy.yml environments: [] # Warm standby — blocked on parallelism grant service_connection: azure-ipai domain: Web status: blocked blocker: "AzDO hosted parallelism not granted" note: "Active deploy authority is GitHub Actions until parallelism is available" # ============================================================================= # Blockers / Preconditions # ============================================================================= preconditions:

# Azure-Native Odoo.sh Equivalent — Machine-Readable Target State
# Human doc: docs/architecture/azure/AZURE_ODOOSH_EQUIVALENT.md

version: "1.0"
schema: ssot.governance.azure-odoosh-equivalent.v1
updated_at: "2026-03-15"

platform_goal: azure_native_odoosh_equivalent
doctrine: >
  Odoo.sh is the capability benchmark, not the implementation target.
  Azure is the deployment surface. Codify behavior on top of primitives.

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Canonical Naming
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
canonical_naming:
  databases:
    dev: odoo_dev
    dev_demo: odoo_dev_demo
    staging: odoo_staging
    production: odoo
  environments:
    dev: odoo-dev
    staging: odoo-staging
    production: odoo-production
  rule: >
    Database names use underscores (canonical, never renamed).
    Environment/infra labels use hyphens (Azure resource naming only).
    Never use: odoo_prod, odoo_core, odoo_stage, odoo_dev_clean.

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Control Plane
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
control_plane:
  source_control: github
  ci_cd:
    primary: github_actions
    selective: azure_devops_pipelines
  identity:
    provider: microsoft_entra_id
    managed_identity: true
  secrets:
    provider: azure_key_vault
    vault: kv-ipai-dev
    rotation_enforced: true

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Runtime Plane
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
runtime:
  compute: azure_container_apps
  fallback_compute: azure_vm
  database:
    service: azure_postgresql_flexible_server
    version: "16"
  filestore: azure_blob_storage
  registry: azure_container_registry
  preview_environments: true

Environment/infra labels use hyphens (Azure resource naming only). Never use: odoo_prod, odoo_core, odoo_stage, odoo_dev_clean. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Control Plane # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- control_plane: source_control: github ci_cd: primary: github_actions selective: azure_devops_pipelines identity: provider: microsoft_entra_id managed_identity: true secrets: provider: azure_key_vault vault: kv-ipai-dev rotation_enforced: true # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Runtime Plane # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- runtime: compute: azure_container_apps fallback_compute: azure_vm database: service: azure_postgresql_flexible_server version: "16" filestore: azure_blob_storage registry: azure_container_registry preview_environments: true

  environments:
    dev:
      database: odoo_dev
      workers: 1
      mail: mailhog_sink
      cron: disabled
      integrations: sandbox
      url: erp-dev.insightpulseai.com
      backup_cadence: none
      access: developers

    staging:
      database: odoo_staging
      workers: 2
      mail: mailhog_sink
      cron: gated
      integrations: sandbox
      url: erp-staging.insightpulseai.com
      backup_cadence: daily
      backup_retention_days: 7
      data_source: sanitized_prod_snapshot
      access: dev_qa_pm

    production:
      database: odoo
      workers: 4
      mail: zoho_smtp
      cron: live
      integrations: live
      url: erp.insightpulseai.com
      backup_cadence: daily
      backup_retention_days: 30
      pitr: true
      access: all_authorized

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Edge / Routing
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
network_edge:
  dns: cloudflare
  public_edge: azure_front_door
  tls: managed_certificates
  waf: true

text:
erp-dev.insightpulseai.com backup_cadence: none access: developers staging: database: odoo_staging workers: 2 mail: mailhog_sink cron: gated integrations: sandbox url: erp-staging.insightpulseai.com backup_cadence: daily backup_retention_days: 7 data_source: sanitized_prod_snapshot access: dev_qa_pm production: database: odoo workers: 4 mail: zoho_smtp cron: live integrations: live url: erp.insightpulseai.com backup_cadence: daily backup_retention_days: 30 pitr: true access: all_authorized # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Edge / Routing # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- network_edge: dns: cloudflare public_edge: azure_front_door tls: managed_certificates waf: true

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Observability
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
observability:
  logging: azure_log_analytics
  metrics: azure_monitor
  tracing: application_insights
  alerts:
    - name: odoo_health_down
      condition: "/web/health != 200 for 3min"
      severity: critical
      target: slack_ops_alerts
    - name: pg_cpu_high
      condition: "cpu > 80% for 5min"
      severity: warning
      target: slack_ops_alerts
    - name: container_restart_loop
      condition: "> 3 restarts in 10min"
      severity: critical
      target: slack_and_pagerduty
    - name: backup_failure
      condition: "daily backup job fails"
      severity: critical
      target: slack_and_email
  dashboards:
    - name: odoops_kpis
      kpis:
        - metric: uptime_prod
          target: ">99.5%"
        - metric: deploy_frequency
          target: ">1/week"
        - metric: deploy_lead_time
          target: "<4h"
        - metric: mttr
          target: "<1h"
        - metric: test_pass_rate
          target: ">95%"
        - metric: backup_success
          target: "100%"

text:
severity: warning target: slack_ops_alerts - name: container_restart_loop condition: "> 3 restarts in 10min" severity: critical target: slack_and_pagerduty - name: backup_failure condition: "daily backup job fails" severity: critical target: slack_and_email dashboards: - name: odoops_kpis kpis: - metric: uptime_prod target: ">99.5%" - metric: deploy_frequency target: ">1/week" - metric: deploy_lead_time target: "<4h" - metric: mttr target: "<1h" - metric: test_pass_rate target: ">95%" - metric: backup_success target: "100%"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Non-prod Safety Controls
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
non_prod_safety:
  mail_catcher: true
  cron_controls: true
  sandbox_integrations: true
  staging_refresh_from_prod: true
  pii_masking: true
  payment_providers_test_mode: true

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Release Model
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
release_model:
  promotion_path: [dev, staging, production]
  dev_deploy: automatic_on_merge
  staging_deploy: manual_approval
  production_deploy: manual_approval_with_evidence
  rollback: supported
  evidence_required: true
  evidence_path: "docs/evidence/{YYYYMMDD-HHMM}/{scope}/"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# AI / Copilot Plane
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
ai_plane:
  copilot_runtime: microsoft_foundry
  gateway: true
  evaluations_required: true
  publish_gate: true
  bridge_module: ipai_enterprise_bridge

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Odoo.sh Parity Checklist
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
parity_status:
  - capability: every_commit_builds
    status: partial
    note: "CI exists, deploy gate missing"

  - capability: branch_test_environments
    status: planned
